exposure_rationale_en: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like staff scheduling, inventory ordering, and payroll management, the core of the job requires physical presence and real-time human interaction. Managers must physically inspect facilities for safety, handle unpredictable interpersonal conflicts with staff and customers, and perform manual labor during peak hours, which provides a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 法医技术员
exposure_rationale: 该角色是物理证据收集和数字分析的混合体。虽然AI可以显著自动化模式识别（指纹、弹道学）和统计报告，但该工作需要亲临犯罪现场收集样本，以及作为专家证人在法庭上作证所需的人类可信度。
exposure_rationale_en: The role is a hybrid of physical evidence collection and digital analysis. While AI can significantly automate pattern recognition (fingerprints, ballistics) and statistical reporting, the job requires physical presence at crime scenes to collect samples and the human credibility necessary to testify in court as an expert witness.

title: 森林和保护工作者
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责是高度物理化的，在不可预测的户外环境中执行，如种植树苗、清除灌木和扑灭森林火灾。虽然AI和遥感可以协助树木计数和健康监测等辅助任务，但主要的劳动密集型功能无法被数字AI系统自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical and performed in unpredictable outdoor environments, such as planting seedlings, clearing brush, and suppressing forest fires. While AI and remote sensing can assist with peripheral tasks like tree counting and health monitoring, the primary labor-intensive functions cannot be automated by digital AI systems.

title: 筹款专员
exposure_rationale: 筹款涉及大量数字工作，包括捐赠者研究、数据分析和促销信息创建，所有这些都极易受到AI自动化和增强的影响。虽然大额捐赠募集和活动管理需要高层次的人际技能和物理存在，但大多数行政、分析和沟通任务正朝着AI驱动的工作流程转变。
exposure_rationale_en: Fundraising involves significant digital work including donor research, data analysis, and the creation of promotional messaging, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While major gift solicitation and event management require high-level interpersonal skills and physical presence, the majority of the administrative, analytical, and communication-based tasks are moving toward AI-driven workflows.

title: 殡葬服务工作者
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及准备遗体和运送逝者等物理任务，以及提供悲伤咨询和安慰等高风险人际工作。虽然AI可以简化死亡证明提交、排程和讣告撰写等行政职责，但无法替代殡葬服务所需的物理存在和情商。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks like preparing remains and transporting the deceased, alongside high-stakes interpersonal work providing grief counseling and comfort. While AI can streamline administrative duties like filing death certificates, scheduling, and writing obituaries, it cannot replace the physical presence and emotional intelligence required for funeral services.

title: 博彩服务工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业是物理待客服务和数字化相邻信息处理的混合体。虽然AI和自动化通过在线平台和自动化投注显著影响体育博彩写手和老虎机运营，但荷官和经理的核心工作涉及物理存在、手工灵巧性和实时人际互动，以确保'愉快的体验'并监控物理规则违规。
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of physical hospitality and digital-adjacent information processing. While AI and automation are significantly impacting sports book writers and slot operations through online platforms and automated betting, the core of the job for dealers and managers involves physical presence, manual dexterity, and real-time human interaction to ensure a 'pleasant experience' and monitor for physical rule violations.

title: 一般维修工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性和不可预测物理环境中的实时问题解决，这些目前超出了AI和机器人技术的能力。AI可能协助通过计算机视觉诊断设备问题或管理供应订单等辅助任务，但维修建筑物和机械的主要工作仍然是动手的人类需求。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable physical environments, which are currently beyond the reach of AI and robotics. AI may assist with peripheral tasks like diagnosing equipment issues via computer vision or managing supply orders, but the primary work of repairing buildings and machinery remains a hands-on human requirement.

title: 综合办公室文员
exposure_rationale: 该角色的核心职责——数据录入、文档格式化、排程和信息处理——几乎完全是数字化和常规的，极易受到AI自动化的影响。虽然处理邮件或接待访客等物理任务仍然存在，但绝大多数工作量可以被AI代理和自动化软件吸收，这反映在美国劳工统计局对该职业的预计下降中。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this role—data entry, document formatting, scheduling, and information processing—are almost entirely digital and routine, making them highly susceptible to AI automation. While some physical tasks like handling mail or greeting visitors remain, the vast majority of the workload can be absorbed by AI agents and automated software, as reflected in the BLS's projected decline for the occupation.

title: 遗传咨询师
exposure_rationale: 遗传咨询师从事高层次知识工作，包括分析复杂的DNA数据和病史，极易受到AI优化的影响。然而，该角色的核心涉及为患者提供心理支持和引导敏感的伦理决策，需要限制全面自动化的同理心和人际联系水平。
exposure_rationale_en: Genetic counselors perform high-level knowledge work, including analyzing complex DNA data and medical histories, which is highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core of the role involves providing psychological support and navigating sensitive ethical decisions with patients, requiring a level of empathy and human connection that limits full automation.

title: 地理学家
exposure_rationale: 地理学家主要从事数字知识工作，包括数据分析、GIS建模和报告撰写，所有这些都极易受到AI自动化和增强的影响。虽然存在一些实地工作，但该专业的核心涉及处理卫星图像和人口普查数据——这些任务AI和机器学习正迅速变得比人类更高效。
exposure_rationale_en: Geographers primarily perform digital knowledge work, including data analysis, GIS modeling, and report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While some fieldwork exists, the core of the profession involves processing satellite imagery and census data—tasks where AI and machine learning are rapidly becoming more efficient than humans.

title: 地质和水文技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业是物理实地工作和数字数据分析的混合体。虽然AI和自动化（如无人机和远程传感器）越来越多地处理数据收集和制图，但该角色仍需要显著的物理存在来进行设备维护、手动样本收集和无法完全数字化的实验室测试。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital data analysis. While AI and automation (like drones and remote sensors) are increasingly handling data collection and mapping, the role still requires significant physical presence for equipment maintenance, manual sample collection, and laboratory testing that cannot be fully digitized.

title: 地球科学家
exposure_rationale: 地球科学家有着平衡的物理和数字工作组合。虽然AI在分析地震数据、GIS制图和预测建模方面非常有效，但该工作的核心需要在偏远环境中进行物理实地工作、样本收集和AI无法执行的实验室测试。因此，AI将显著增强他们的分析生产力，但无法替代该专业所需的基本物理存在和真实世界数据收集。
exposure_rationale_en: Geoscientists have a balanced mix of physical and digital work. While AI is highly effective at analyzing seismic data, GIS mapping, and predictive modeling, the core of the job requires physical fieldwork, sample collection in remote environments, and laboratory testing that AI cannot perform. Consequently, AI will significantly enhance their analytical productivity but cannot replace the essential physical presence and real-world data gathering required for the profession.

title: 玻璃安装工
exposure_rationale: 玻璃安装工的核心工作是高度物理性的，需要手工灵巧性、力量和在不可预测的建筑环境中的实时问题解决。虽然AI可能协助蓝图分析或精确测量等辅助任务，但在物理世界中实际安装、切割和固定玻璃仍然远超当前AI和机器人能力。
exposure_rationale_en: The core work of a glazier is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable construction environments. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or precision measurements, the actual installation, cutting, and securing of glass in the physical world remain well beyond current AI and robotic capabilities.

title: 平面设计师
exposure_rationale: 平面设计是一个基本上数字化的职业，核心任务——图像生成、版面创建和照片编辑——正被生成式AI快速转化。虽然高层次的创意指导和客户管理仍然以人为核心，但制作任务的自动化显著提高了个人生产力，可能减少常规商业工作所需的设计师总数。
exposure_rationale_en: Graphic design is a fundamentally digital occupation where core tasks—image generation, layout creation, and photo editing—are being rapidly transformed by generative AI. While high-level creative direction and client management remain human-centric, the automation of production tasks significantly increases individual productivity, likely reducing the total number of designers needed for routine commercial work.

title: 场地维护工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是物理性的，在不可预测的户外环境中执行，这为AI提供了强大的天然屏障。虽然自动割草机或无人机可能协助特定任务，但大多数工作——如种植、爬树和复杂的手动维护——需要AI无法复制的人类灵巧性和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical and performed in unpredictable outdoor environments, which provides a strong natural barrier against AI. While autonomous mowers or drones may assist with specific tasks, the majority of the work—such as planting, tree climbing, and complex manual maintenance—requires human dexterity and physical presence that AI cannot replicate.

title: 搬运工和物料搬运工
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责是根本性的物理化，涉及在不可预测的真实世界环境中重型材料的手动搬运、清洁和包装。虽然AI可以优化物流、路线和库存跟踪，但体力劳动本身抵抗AI，需要先进的机器人技术而非基于软件的智能来自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are fundamentally physical, involving the manual movement, cleaning, and packing of heavy materials in unpredictable real-world environments. While AI can optimize logistics, routing, and inventory tracking, the physical labor itself is resistant to AI and requires advanced robotics rather than software-based intelligence to automate.

title: 危险物质清除工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及不可预测环境中的体力劳动，如擦洗表面、建造围护区域和操作重型机械。虽然AI可能协助记录保存、法规合规检查或分析辐射水平传感器数据等辅助任务，但主要工作需要人类物理存在来导航复杂的危险场所。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as scrubbing surfaces, constructing containment areas, and operating heavy machinery. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like record-keeping, regulatory compliance checks, or analyzing sensor data for radiation levels, the primary work requires a physical human presence to navigate complex, hazardous sites.

title: 健康和安全工程师
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字知识工作和物理存在的混合。虽然AI可以协助审查设备计划、分析事故数据和解读复杂的安全法规，但核心职责需要对设施进行物理检查、对员工进行调查访谈，以及指导安全设备的动手安装。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation involves a significant mix of digital knowledge work and physical presence. While AI can assist in reviewing equipment plans, analyzing accident data, and interpreting complex safety regulations, the core duties require physical inspections of facilities, interviewing employees for investigations, and directing the hands-on installation of safety devices.

title: 健康教育专家
exposure_rationale: 大量角色涉及分析社区健康数据、撰写基金申请和创建教育材料等数字知识工作，所有这些都极易受到AI增强的影响。然而，社区倡导、共情人际互动和当地活动和培训的物理存在的核心要求为全面自动化提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: A significant portion of the role involves digital knowledge work such as analyzing community health data, writing grant proposals, and creating educational materials, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core requirements of community advocacy, empathetic interpersonal interaction, and physical presence for local events and training provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 健康信息技术员和医疗登记员
exposure_rationale: 该职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及计算机化系统中临床数据的分析、组织和验证。AI非常适合数据抽取、分类编码和从大数据集生成报告等核心任务，这显著增加了自动化和重组的风险。
title_en: Health information technologists and medical registrars
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving the analysis, organization, and validation of clinical data within computerized systems. AI is exceptionally well-suited for core tasks like data abstraction, classification coding, and generating reports from large datasets, which significantly increases the risk of automation and restructuring.

title: 暖通空调和制冷设备技师
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性和不可预测物理环境中的实时问题解决，高度抵抗AI。虽然AI可能协助诊断软件、排程或能源负荷计算等辅助任务，但无法执行该工作所需的物理安装、维修或危险材料处理。
title_en: Heating, air conditioning, and refrigeration mechanics and installers
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time problem solving in unpredictable physical environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like diagnostic software, scheduling, or energy load calculations, it cannot perform the physical installation, repair, or handling of hazardous materials required for the job.

title: 重型卡车和挂车司机
exposure_rationale: 虽然驾驶的核心任务是物理性的且发生在复杂的真实世界环境中，但它是自动驾驶AI的主要目标，最终可能自动化长途高速公路路段。然而，该工作仍需要大量物理存在来完成非驾驶任务，如固定货物、进行检查和导航对当前AI仍具挑战性的'最后一公里'城市环境。
exposure_rationale_en: While the core task of driving is physical and occurs in a complex real-world environment, it is a primary target for autonomous vehicle AI, which could eventually automate long-haul highway segments. However, the job still requires significant physical presence for non-driving tasks like securing cargo, conducting inspections, and navigating 'last-mile' urban environments that remain challenging for current AI.

title: 重型车辆和移动设备维修技师
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心是高度物理性的，涉及手工灵巧性、力量和农场和建筑工地等不可预测环境中的真实世界故障排除。虽然AI将显著增强诊断软件和预测性维护记录，但无法执行重型机械组件的物理拆卸、维修和重新组装。
title_en: Heavy vehicle and mobile equipment service technicians
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, involving manual dexterity, strength, and real-world troubleshooting in unpredictable environments like farms and construction sites. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic software and predictive maintenance logs, it cannot perform the physical disassembly, repair, and reassembly of heavy mechanical components.

title: 高中教师
exposure_rationale: 高中教师高度暴露，因为课程规划、内容创作和评分等核心数字任务极易受到AI自动化和增强的影响。虽然课堂管理和人际辅导的物理要求提供了缓冲，但AI提供个性化辅导和自动化反馈的能力显著重塑了该专业的教学交付和行政工作量。
exposure_rationale_en: High school teachers are heavily exposed because core digital tasks like lesson planning, content creation, and grading are highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the physical requirement of classroom management and interpersonal mentorship provides a buffer, AI's ability to provide personalized tutoring and automated feedback significantly reshapes the instructional delivery and administrative workload of the profession.

title: 历史学家
exposure_rationale: 历史学家从事高层次知识工作——研究、分析和写作——日益数字化且极易受到AI驱动的文件处理和综合效率提升的影响。虽然该工作需要人类判断和与文物或档案的物理互动，但报告和文章的核心产出面临重大重组，因为AI工具变得能够解析庞大的历史数据集并起草复杂的叙事。
exposure_rationale_en: Historians perform high-level knowledge work—researching, analyzing, and writing—that is increasingly digital and highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains in document processing and synthesis. While the job requires human judgment and physical interaction with artifacts or archives, the core output of reports and articles faces significant restructuring as AI tools become capable of parsing vast historical datasets and drafting complex narratives.

title: 家庭健康和个人护理助理
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责是根本性的物理化和人际化，涉及在不可预测的家庭环境中沐浴、穿衣和搬抬患者等手动任务。虽然AI可能协助排程或监控生命体征等辅助行政任务，但无法替代个人护理所需的基本人类存在和体力劳动。
title_en: Home health and personal care aides
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are fundamentally physical and interpersonal, involving manual tasks like bathing, dressing, and lifting patients in unpredictable home environments. While AI may assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling or monitoring vital signs, it cannot replace the essential human presence and physical labor required for personal care.

title: 人力资源经理
exposure_rationale: 人力资源管理是一个数字化密集型知识职业，AI可以显著自动化招聘筛选、工资处理和法规合规报告。虽然该角色需要高层次的纠纷调解人际技能和战略领导力，但绝大多数行政和分析任务极易受到AI驱动的生产力提升和重组的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Human resources management is a digital-heavy knowledge occupation where AI can significantly automate recruitment screening, payroll processing, and regulatory compliance reporting. While the role requires high-level interpersonal skills for dispute mediation and strategic leadership, the vast majority of the administrative and analytical tasks are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and restructuring.

title: 人力资源专员
exposure_rationale: 招聘、筛选和行政记录保存的核心任务是高度数字化和数据驱动的，使其成为AI自动化和增强的首要目标。虽然该角色需要大量人际互动和面试及员工关系的人类判断，但AI现在可以处理复杂的排程、初始候选人审查和政策咨询，显著提高个人工作者生产力并减少对入门级行政人员的需求。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of recruiting, screening, and administrative record-keeping are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime targets for AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal interaction and human judgment for interviewing and employee relations, AI can now handle complex scheduling, initial candidate vetting, and policy inquiries, significantly increasing individual worker productivity and reducing the need for entry-level administrative staff.

title: 水文学家
exposure_rationale: 水文学家对AI有高暴露度，因为大量工作涉及数据分析、计算机建模和报告撰写——AI正在快速推进的任务。然而，实地调查工作的物理要求，如在偏远地点收集水样和测量流量，为全面自动化提供了实质性的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Hydrologists have a high exposure to AI because a significant portion of their work involves data analysis, computer modeling, and report writing—tasks where AI is rapidly advancing. However, the physical requirement of field work, such as collecting water samples and measuring streamflow in remote locations, provides a substantial buffer against full automation.

title: 工业设计师
exposure_rationale: 工业设计是一个以草图绘制、3D建模和渲染为核心任务的数字化职业，正被生成式AI和先进的CAD自动化快速转化。虽然该角色需要物理原型制作和跨功能协作，但绝大多数设计过程是基于计算机的，使其极易受到AI驱动的生产力提升和工作流程重组的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Industrial design is a predominantly digital occupation where core tasks like sketching, 3D modeling, and rendering are being rapidly transformed by generative AI and advanced CAD automation. While the role requires physical prototyping and cross-functional collaboration, the vast majority of the design process is computer-based, making it highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and workflow restructuring.

title: 工业工程技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字工作，如分析生产成本、使用CAD/CAM软件和进行统计研究，所有这些都极易受到AI自动化的影响。然而，该角色还需要在制造车间的物理存在来观察工人、评估机械性能和评估物理布局，这为全面自动化提供了部分缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation involves a significant amount of digital work, such as analyzing production costs, using CAD/CAM software, and conducting statistical studies, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. However, the role also requires physical presence on the manufacturing floor to observe workers, assess machinery performance, and evaluate physical layouts, which provides a partial buffer against full automation.

title: 工业工程师
exposure_rationale: 工业工程大量聚焦于数据分析、系统设计和流程优化——AI和机器学习擅长的任务。虽然该角色需要物理现场访问和人类协作来理解工作流程，但核心工作产品是数字分析和建模，使该职业极易受到通过AI驱动自动化实现的显著生产力提升和重组的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Industrial engineering is heavily focused on data analysis, systems design, and process optimization—tasks where AI and machine learning excel. While the role requires physical site visits and human collaboration to understand workflows, the core work product is digital analysis and modeling, making the occupation highly susceptible to significant productivity gains and restructuring through AI-driven automation.

title: 工业机械维修工
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性和不可预测物理环境中的实时故障排除，为AI自动化提供了强大的屏障。虽然AI将显著增强诊断能力和预测性维护调度，但重型机械的实际维修、安装和物理操作仍需要人类存在和机械技能。
title_en: Industrial machinery mechanics, machinery maintenance workers, and millwrights
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time troubleshooting in unpredictable physical environments, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic capabilities and predictive maintenance scheduling, the actual repair, installation, and physical manipulation of heavy machinery still require human presence and mechanical skill.

title: 工业生产经理
exposure_rationale: 该角色是数字知识工作和物理监督的混合体。AI将显著增强工作的分析方面，如生产调度、预算优化和预测性维护数据分析，但物理工厂存在、人员管理和手动环境中实时问题解决的核心要求为全面自动化提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This role is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical oversight. AI will significantly enhance the analytical aspects of the job, such as production scheduling, budget optimization, and predictive maintenance data analysis, but the core requirements of physical plant presence, personnel management, and real-time problem-solving in a manual environment provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 信息服务文员
exposure_rationale: 该职业高度暴露，因为核心任务——处理常规数据、回答查询和维护记录——本质上是数字化和信息化的。虽然酒店前台职员或机场代理等角色需要物理存在，但大多数工作涉及常规信息处理，正越来越多地被AI驱动的自助服务系统、聊天机器人和自动化数据录入工具自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is highly exposed because its core tasks—processing routine data, answering inquiries, and maintaining records—are fundamentally digital and information-based. While some roles like hotel desk clerks or airport agents require a physical presence, the majority of the work involves routine information processing that is increasingly being automated by AI-driven self-service systems, chatbots, and automated data entry tools.

title: 信息安全分析师
exposure_rationale: 该职业完全是数字化的，涉及监控网络、分析漏洞和撰写报告等极易受到AI自动化影响的任务。虽然AI增加了安全需求以对抗AI驱动的威胁，但它也显著自动化了威胁检测、日志分析和事件响应的核心功能，大幅提高了个人工作者的生产力。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is entirely digital, involving tasks like monitoring networks, analyzing vulnerabilities, and writing reports that are highly susceptible to AI automation. While AI increases the demand for security to counter AI-driven threats, it also significantly automates the core functions of threat detection, log analysis, and incident response, drastically increasing individual worker productivity.

title: 教学协调员
exposure_rationale: 教学协调员从事高层次知识工作，包括课程开发、数据分析和教育材料审查，所有这些都是极易受到AI增强的数字化优先任务。虽然该角色需要大量的教师辅导和利益相关者管理的人际互动，但核心'产品'——课程和教学策略——可以使用生成式AI和高级分析更快地生成和优化。
exposure_rationale_en: Instructional coordinators perform high-level knowledge work including curriculum development, data analysis, and educational material review, all of which are digital-first tasks highly susceptible to AI augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal interaction for teacher coaching and stakeholder management, the core 'product'—curricula and instructional strategies—can be generated and optimized much faster using generative AI and advanced analytics.

title: 绝缘工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责是高度物理化的，需要在阁楼和爬行空间等不可预测、狭窄环境中的手工灵巧性。AI对材料的物理安装影响极小，尽管可能轻微协助蓝图分析或材料估算等辅助任务。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical and require manual dexterity in unpredictable, confined environments like attics and crawl spaces. AI has minimal impact on the physical installation of materials, though it may slightly assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or material estimation.

title: 保险销售代理
exposure_rationale: 分析保单、定制保险方案和维护记录的核心任务是数字化和数据驱动的，极易受到AI自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要人际信任和说服性销售技能，但AI驱动的聊天机器人和推荐引擎越来越有能力处理常规查询和保单比较，显著提高个人代理的生产力并减少简单交易中对人工干预的需求。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of analyzing policies, customizing insurance programs, and maintaining records are digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires interpersonal trust and persuasive sales skills, AI-powered chatbots and recommendation engines are increasingly capable of handling routine inquiries and policy comparisons, significantly increasing individual agent productivity and reducing the need for human intervention in simple transactions.

title: 保险核保员
exposure_rationale: 核保是一个以常规信息处理、风险建模和数据分析为核心的基本数字化职业——所有这些领域AI都很擅长。美国劳工统计局已经预测由于自动化导致就业下降，从传统软件向先进AI的转变可能甚至自动化以前需要人类判断的复杂、非标准风险评估。
exposure_rationale_en: Underwriting is a fundamentally digital occupation centered on routine information processing, risk modeling, and data analysis—all areas where AI excels. The BLS already projects a decline in employment due to automation, and the shift from traditional software to advanced AI will likely automate even complex, non-standard risk assessments that previously required human judgment.

title: 室内设计师
exposure_rationale: 室内设计大量依赖CAD和BIM等数字工具，这些正被能从文字提示创建照片级逼真渲染和平面图的生成式AI快速转化。虽然该工作需要物理现场访问、材料检查和与承包商的复杂人际协调，但核心创意和技术制图任务极易受到AI驱动的自动化和生产力提升的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Interior design is heavily reliant on digital tools like CAD and BIM, which are being rapidly transformed by generative AI capable of creating photorealistic renderings and floor plans from text prompts. While the job requires physical site visits, material inspections, and complex interpersonal coordination with contractors, the core creative and technical drafting tasks are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains.

title: 口译员和笔译员
exposure_rationale: 核心工作产品是纯数字信息（文本和语音），在大语言模型已经展示接近人类水平的领域。虽然高风险口译（法律、医疗）和手语仍需要人类存在和细微判断，但绝大多数翻译和常规口译任务正被快速自动化或转向'译后编辑'角色，显著减少了每单位工作所需的人类劳动总量。
exposure_rationale_en: The core work product is purely digital information (text and speech) in a domain where Large Language Models already demonstrate near-human proficiency. While high-stakes interpreting (legal, medical) and sign language still require human presence and nuanced judgment, the vast majority of translation and routine interpreting tasks are being rapidly automated or shifted to 'post-editing' roles, significantly reducing the total human labor required per unit of work.

title: 钢铁工人
exposure_rationale: 钢铁工作是一个在不可预测的户外环境和高空执行的高度物理化职业，为AI和机器人技术提供了显著的天然屏障。虽然AI可能协助蓝图分析或工地调度等辅助任务，但在结构梁上手动焊接、螺栓连接和平衡的核心职责需要当前或近期技术无法自动化的实时人类灵巧性和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: Ironworking is a highly physical occupation performed in unpredictable, outdoor environments and at great heights, which provides a significant natural barrier to AI and robotics. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or site scheduling, the core duties of manual welding, bolting, and balancing on structural beams require real-time human dexterity and physical presence that cannot be automated with current or near-future technology.

title: 清洁工和保洁员
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是物理性的，涉及在学校、医院和建筑工地等不可预测和多样的环境中的体力劳动。虽然AI可能协助供应订购或排程等次要行政任务，但清洁、消毒和进行物理维修的主要工作仍然是AI和机器人自动化的显著屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical, involving manual labor in unpredictable and varied environments like schools, hospitals, and construction sites. While AI might assist with minor administrative tasks like supply ordering or scheduling, the primary work of cleaning, disinfecting, and making physical repairs remains a significant barrier to AI and robotic automation.

title: 珠宝商和贵金属工匠
exposure_rationale: 该工作的核心涉及AI无法复制的物理灵巧性、手动维修和动手手工艺。然而，AI和自动化通过生成式CAD工具和自动化宝石分级显著影响了设计和评估阶段，促成了总就业的预计下降。
title_en: Jewelers and precious stone and metal workers
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job involves physical dexterity, manual repair, and hands-on craftsmanship that AI cannot replicate. However, AI and automation are significantly impacting the design and appraisal phases through generative CAD tools and automated gemstone grading, contributing to a projected decline in total employment.

title: 法官和听证官
exposure_rationale: 研究法律问题、评估文件和撰写意见的核心任务是高度数字化的，易受AI自动化影响，可以显著提高生产力并减少对人类工作人员的需求。然而，该角色需要高风险的人类判断、主持物理法庭和维护公众信任，这为全面自动化创造了显著的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of researching legal issues, evaluating documents, and writing opinions are highly digital and susceptible to AI automation, which can significantly increase productivity and reduce the need for human staff. However, the role requires high-stakes human judgment, presiding over physical courtrooms, and maintaining public trust, which creates a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 幼儿园和小学教师
exposure_rationale: AI将显著自动化课程规划、评分和行政沟通等后台知识工作，这些目前占据教师大量时间。然而，该角色的核心涉及对幼儿的物理监督、情感支持和实时行为管理，这为全面自动化创造了实质性的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: AI will significantly automate back-end knowledge work such as lesson planning, grading, and administrative communication, which currently occupy a large portion of a teacher's time. However, the core of the role involves physical supervision, emotional support, and real-time behavioral management of young children, which creates a substantial barrier to full automation.

title: 劳动关系专员
exposure_rationale: 该职业主要是数字化和知识化的，涉及合同起草、政策制定和法律合规——所有这些领域AI都很擅长。虽然高风险的人际谈判和纠纷解决提供了缓冲，但AI将显著自动化研究、文件生成和调查分析组件。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is predominantly digital and knowledge-based, involving the drafting of contracts, policy development, and legal compliance—all areas where AI excels. While the high-stakes interpersonal negotiation and dispute resolution provide a buffer, AI will significantly automate the research, document generation, and investigative analysis components of the role.

title: 景观建筑师
exposure_rationale: 景观建筑是一个以CADD建模、场地分析和成本估算为核心任务的数字化知识型职业，极易受到AI自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要物理现场访问和人际客户管理，但AI的生成式设计能力可以显著加速创意和技术制图阶段，可能减少每个项目所需的人类工时。
exposure_rationale_en: Landscape architecture is a predominantly digital knowledge-based occupation where core tasks like CADD modeling, site analysis, and cost estimation are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While the role requires physical site visits and interpersonal client management, the generative design capabilities of AI can significantly accelerate the creative and technical drafting phases, potentially reducing the total human hours required per project.

title: 律师
exposure_rationale: 律师从事几乎完全数字化的高层次知识工作，涉及文件起草、法律研究和复杂数据分析——所有这些领域大语言模型都很擅长。虽然法庭辩护和高风险人际谈判提供了保护屏障，但绝大多数计费工时花在AI现在可以显著加速或自动化的任务上，导致该专业的重大结构性变化。
exposure_rationale_en: Lawyers perform high-level knowledge work that is almost entirely digital, involving document drafting, legal research, and complex data analysis—all areas where LLMs excel. While courtroom advocacy and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation provide a protective barrier, the vast majority of billable hours are spent on tasks that AI can now significantly accelerate or automate, leading to major structural changes in the profession.

title: 图书馆员
exposure_rationale: 图书馆学本质上是关于信息检索、组织和研究——大语言模型和AI搜索引擎擅长的领域。虽然在学校和公共图书馆的物理存在通过社区项目和人际支持提供了缓冲，但编目、数据库管理和参考咨询的核心技术任务高度暴露于AI自动化和替代。
exposure_rationale_en: Librarianship is fundamentally about information retrieval, organization, and research—domains where LLMs and AI search engines excel. While the physical presence in schools and public libraries provides a buffer through community programming and interpersonal support, the core technical tasks of cataloging, database management, and reference assistance are highly exposed to AI automation and displacement.

title: 图书馆技术员和助理
exposure_rationale: 该角色的大量部分涉及常规信息处理、编目和回答参考问题，所有这些都极易受到AI自动化的影响。虽然重新上架图书等物理任务和人际社区项目提供了一些保护，但核心数字和文书功能越来越多地由自动化系统和AI驱动的搜索工具处理。
exposure_rationale_en: A significant portion of this role involves routine information processing, cataloging, and answering reference questions, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. While physical tasks like reshelving books and interpersonal community programming provide some protection, the core digital and clerical functions are increasingly being handled by automated systems and AI-driven search tools.

title: 执业护士
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及沐浴、穿衣和伤口护理等物理任务，目前超出AI和机器人技术的能力。然而，AI将显著影响工作的信息处理方面，包括记录患者护理、监测生命体征和协助诊断报告，导致中等的总体暴露度。
title_en: Licensed practical and licensed vocational nurses
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks such as bathing, dressing, and wound care, which are currently beyond the reach of AI and robotics. However, AI will significantly impact the information-processing aspects of the job, including documenting patient care, monitoring vitals, and assisting with diagnostic reporting, leading to moderate overall exposure.

title: 贷款专员
exposure_rationale: 贷款专员的核心任务——分析财务数据、验证文件和评估风险——本质上是数字化的且极易受到AI自动化的影响。虽然复杂的商业贷款和基于关系的抵押贷款销售仍需要人类判断和人际技能，但自动化承保和AI驱动的客户服务的快速发展显著减少了常规贷款处理中对人工干预的需求。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of loan officers—analyzing financial data, verifying documentation, and assessing risk—are fundamentally digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. While complex commercial loans and relationship-based mortgage sales still require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the rapid advancement of automated underwriting and AI-driven customer service significantly reduces the need for human intervention in routine loan processing.

title: 住宿管理人员
exposure_rationale: 住宿管理人员从事数字知识工作和物理场地管理的混合体。虽然AI可以自动化收益管理、动态定价和员工排班等后台任务，但核心角色需要设施的物理检查和与客人和员工的高风险人际冲突解决，这些无法完全数字化。
exposure_rationale_en: Lodging managers perform a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical site management. While AI can automate back-office tasks like revenue management, dynamic pricing, and staff scheduling, the core role requires physical inspections of facilities and high-stakes interpersonal conflict resolution with guests and staff that cannot be fully digitized.

title: 伐木工人
exposure_rationale: 核心工作是高度物理化的，涉及在不可预测的户外环境中操作重型机械和体力劳动。虽然AI可能通过计算机视觉改进原木分级或优化采伐规划等辅助任务，但伐木和运输木材的物理要求为AI替代提供了强大的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: The core work is highly physical, involving the operation of heavy machinery and manual labor in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI may improve peripheral tasks like log grading through computer vision or optimize harvest planning, the physical requirements of felling and transporting timber provide a strong barrier to AI replacement.

title: 物流师
exposure_rationale: 物流师从事主要数字化的高层次知识工作，涉及数据分析、预测和供应链优化——AI擅长的任务。虽然该角色需要人对人的谈判和对物理中断的真实世界问题解决，但库存管理和路线优化的核心功能越来越多地被复杂的AI算法自动化或增强。
exposure_rationale_en: Logisticians perform high-level knowledge work that is primarily digital, involving data analysis, forecasting, and supply chain optimization—tasks where AI excels. While the role requires human-to-human negotiation and real-world problem-solving for physical disruptions, the core functions of inventory management and route optimization are increasingly being automated or enhanced by sophisticated AI algorithms.

title: 机械师和模具工
exposure_rationale: 该角色涉及重要的物理组件，包括手工灵巧性、机器设置和工厂环境中的材料处理。然而，AI和先进的自动化越来越有能力优化CNC编程、解读CAD设计和监控机器健康，这提高了工人生产力并减少了对传统模具制造技能的需求。
title_en: Machinists and tool and die makers
exposure_rationale_en: The role involves a significant physical component, including manual dexterity, machine setup, and material handling in a factory environment. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of optimizing CNC programming, interpreting CAD designs, and monitoring machine health, which increases worker productivity and reduces the demand for traditional tool and die making skills.

title: 管理咨询顾问
exposure_rationale: 管理分析师从事高层次知识工作——包括数据分析、报告撰写和财务建模——极易受到AI增强和自动化的影响。虽然该角色需要显著的客户访谈和利益相关者管理人际技能，但综合信息和制定效率建议的核心'后台'任务越来越多地被AI工具简化。
exposure_rationale_en: Management analysts perform high-level knowledge work—including data analysis, report writing, and financial modeling—that is highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. While the role requires significant interpersonal skills for client interviews and stakeholder management, the core 'back-office' tasks of synthesizing information and developing efficiency recommendations are increasingly being streamlined by AI tools.

title: 美甲师
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及高精度体力劳动、触觉敏感性和物理环境中的实时人际互动。虽然AI可以协助排程或库存管理等辅助业务任务，但清洁、塑形和装饰指甲的主要服务仍然是用当前机器人技术难以自动化的手动任务。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves high-precision physical labor, tactile sensitivity, and real-time human interaction in a physical environment. While AI can assist with peripheral business tasks like scheduling or inventory management, the primary service of cleaning, shaping, and decorating nails remains a manual task that is difficult to automate with current robotics.

title: 船舶工程师和造船工程师
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及数字设计、复杂数学建模和技术报告撰写，所有这些都极易受到AI驱动的生产力提升和自动化的影响。虽然对船厂和海上平台的物理现场访问提供了缓冲，但向AI集成的CAD、自动化性能测试和船体及机械的生成式设计的转变显著重塑了工作流程。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves digital design, complex mathematical modeling, and technical report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation. While physical site visits to shipyards and offshore platforms provide a buffer, the shift toward AI-integrated CAD, automated performance testing, and generative design for hulls and machinery significantly reshapes the workflow.

title: 市场研究分析师
exposure_rationale: 该角色的核心职责——数据收集、统计分析、趋势预测和报告生成——本质上是数字化的，完美契合AI处理大数据集和生成洞察的优势。虽然仍需人类判断进行高层战略和客户关系，但AI现在可以自动化定义分析师日常工作的绝大多数技术和行政任务。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this role—data collection, statistical analysis, trend forecasting, and report generation—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with AI's strengths in processing large datasets and generating insights. While human judgment is still needed for high-level strategy and client relationships, AI can now automate the vast majority of the technical and administrative tasks that define the daily work of an analyst.

title: 婚姻和家庭治疗师
exposure_rationale: 虽然工作通过远程医疗日益数字化并涉及大量信息处理，但治疗的核心价值在于人对人的共情、信任和复杂人际动态的引导。AI可能会自动化行政任务并提供诊断支持，但家庭和婚姻咨询的高风险情感本质为全面自动化提供了显著的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: While the work is increasingly digital via telehealth and involves significant information processing, the core value of therapy lies in human-to-human empathy, trust, and the navigation of complex interpersonal dynamics. AI will likely automate administrative tasks and provide diagnostic support, but the high-stakes emotional nature of family and marriage counseling provides a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 砌筑工人
exposure_rationale: 砌筑是一个在不可预测的户外环境中执行的高度物理化行业，需要手工灵巧性、力量和实时感官反馈。虽然AI和机器人技术可能协助蓝图分析或受控环境中的专用砌砖机器，但导航泥泞工地、搬运重型材料和修饰表面的核心任务仍然抵抗数字自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: Masonry is a highly physical trade performed in unpredictable outdoor environments that require manual dexterity, strength, and real-time sensory feedback. While AI and robotics may assist with blueprint analysis or specialized brick-laying machines in controlled settings, the core tasks of navigating muddy sites, handling heavy materials, and finishing surfaces remain resistant to digital automation.

title: 按摩治疗师
exposure_rationale: 按摩治疗的核心涉及物理触觉操作、手工灵巧性和对人体的实时评估，AI无法复制。虽然AI可能协助排程、客户记录保存或推荐治疗方案等辅助任务，但治疗干预本身仍是一项基本的物理人类技能。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual manipulation of soft tissues and real-time human empathy in a physical setting. While AI can assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling, marketing, and documentation, it cannot replace the tactile skill and physical presence required for massage therapy.

title: 物料搬运机械操作员
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心是体力劳动和在仓库及建筑工地等环境中操作机械。虽然AI和自动化正在通过自动引导车辆和计算机控制系统推进，但许多环境需要人类判断来进行实时安全决策和不规则物品的处理。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job is physical operation of heavy machinery in dynamic environments like warehouses and construction sites, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI-driven computer vision and autonomous navigation are increasingly being integrated into forklifts and conveyor systems, leading to moderate exposure as these technologies augment or replace human operators in structured settings.

title: 物料记录文员
exposure_rationale: 该职业大量涉及数字化的数据录入、库存跟踪和记录保持，AI和自动化系统已经能够有效执行。虽然一些角色涉及物理收发货物，但核心信息处理功能极易受到自动化影响。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is highly exposed because its core functions—tracking data, scheduling, and inventory reporting—are digital information-processing tasks that AI and automated systems excel at. While some physical presence is required to inspect goods or handle packages, the rapid integration of AI-driven logistics software, RFID technology, and computer vision for quality control is already leading to a projected decline in employment.

title: 材料工程师
exposure_rationale: 材料工程涉及大量数字知识工作，包括数据分析、模拟建模和技术报告撰写。虽然该角色需要物理实验室测试和现场检查，但AI在材料特性预测和计算设计方面的进步正在显著提高生产力。
exposure_rationale_en: Materials engineering is heavily reliant on digital simulation, data analysis, and computational modeling, areas where AI and machine learning are already accelerating material discovery and property prediction. While the role requires physical lab work and manufacturing oversight, a significant portion of the core value—designing alloys, analyzing failures, and writing technical reports—is increasingly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.

title: 数学家和统计学家
exposure_rationale: 该职业本质上是数字化的，核心任务——数据分析、数学建模和算法开发——与AI的能力高度一致。虽然需要人类判断来解读结果和制定策略，但计算和分析的基础工作极易受到AI自动化的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, mathematical modeling, and coding—all domains where AI and Large Language Models excel. While high-level theoretical research and complex interdisciplinary communication require human judgment, AI can now automate significant portions of data cleaning, statistical testing, and code generation, drastically increasing individual productivity and restructuring the workflow.

title: 机械工程技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业是物理和数字工作的混合体。虽然AI可以显著自动化CAD制图、数据分析和报告撰写，但该角色仍需要物理存在来测试设备、组装原型和进行实地检查。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical labor. While AI can significantly automate digital tasks like 3D modeling, data analysis, and cost estimation, the role still requires a substantial physical presence for assembling parts, setting up vehicle crash tests, and operating machinery like lathes and grinders.

title: 机械工程师
exposure_rationale: 机械工程涉及大量以CAD设计、模拟分析和技术文档为核心的数字知识工作，极易受到AI优化的影响。虽然该角色需要物理原型测试和制造监督，但AI在设计优化和仿真方面的进步正在显著重塑工程工作流程。
exposure_rationale_en: Mechanical engineering is heavily reliant on digital tools like CAD, simulations, and data analysis, all of which are being rapidly enhanced by AI to automate complex design iterations and predictive modeling. While the role requires physical prototyping, site visits, and hardware testing, the core intellectual work of designing and analyzing mechanical systems is increasingly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.

title: 医疗卫生服务管理人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业大量涉及数字知识工作，包括预算管理、数据分析和法规合规，极易受到AI增强的影响。然而，该角色需要物理存在来监督医疗设施运营和管理高风险的人际事务。
exposure_rationale_en: This role involves a high volume of digital knowledge work, such as budgeting, scheduling, and regulatory compliance, which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core responsibilities of recruiting, supervising staff, and navigating complex interpersonal relationships within a physical healthcare facility provide a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 医疗助理
exposure_rationale: 该工作涉及大量物理任务如测量生命体征、抽血和协助检查，AI无法替代。虽然AI将自动化排程、保险处理和病历管理等行政方面，但临床物理工作仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: Medical assistants perform a hybrid of physical and digital tasks; while AI can significantly automate administrative duties like scheduling, coding, and medical record entry, it cannot perform physical clinical tasks such as drawing blood, administering injections, or taking manual vital signs. The role requires a high degree of real-time human interaction and empathy in a physical clinical setting, which serves as a natural barrier to full automation.

title: 医学剂量师
exposure_rationale: 该职业高度数字化，涉及放射治疗计划的计算和优化，AI在此领域能力强大。虽然与患者和医疗团队的临床互动提供了缓冲，但核心技术工作极易受到AI增强的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves complex mathematical calculations, image analysis (CT/MRI), and digital treatment planning, all of which are domains where AI and machine learning excel. While there is a minor physical component involving patient positioning and equipment calibration, the vast majority of the work is digital information processing that is highly susceptible to automation and AI-driven optimization.

title: 医疗设备维修工
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心是物理化的，需要手工灵巧性来维修和校准复杂的医疗设备。虽然AI可以增强诊断和预测性维护，但物理维修工作仍需人类技术员完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is physical and manual, requiring dexterity to handle tools, disassemble machinery, and work in tight physical spaces. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic software, troubleshooting, and predictive maintenance scheduling, the physical act of repairing, installing, and calibrating hardware remains a human-centric task that cannot be automated by digital AI alone.

title: 病历管理专员
exposure_rationale: 该职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及临床数据的编码、分类和管理。AI在自然语言处理和数据分类方面的能力使核心任务极易受到自动化影响，尽管对准确性和合规性的监督仍需人类参与。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving the processing, classification, and entry of data into electronic systems. AI is already highly capable of natural language processing and automated medical coding, which directly automates the core tasks of reviewing records and assigning clinical codes, significantly reducing the need for human intervention.

title: 医学科学家
exposure_rationale: 医学科学家从事高层次研究工作，AI正在革新数据分析、文献综述和实验设计。虽然物理实验室工作和临床试验监督提供了缓冲，但大量知识工作组件极易受到AI增强的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Medical scientists perform high-level knowledge work including data analysis, grant writing, and literature reviews, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. While physical laboratory work and clinical trials provide a buffer, the core of the profession is shifting toward computational biology and AI-driven drug discovery, significantly increasing productivity and reshaping research methodologies.

title: 医学转录员
exposure_rationale: 该职业几乎完全是数字化的，将口述医疗记录转化为书面文档——AI语音识别和自然语言处理已经高度精通的任务。该职业面临极高的自动化风险。
exposure_rationale_en: Medical transcription is a purely digital, routine information-processing task that has already been heavily impacted by speech recognition. Modern AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) can now handle complex medical terminology, formatting, and summarization with high accuracy, transforming the human role into a diminishing oversight function or eliminating it entirely.

title: 会议和活动策划师
exposure_rationale: 该角色结合了数字知识工作（预算、合同、物流规划）和物理存在（现场协调、供应商管理）。虽然AI可以显著自动化行政和规划方面，但现场活动管理和人际协调仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: A significant portion of the role involves digital tasks such as logistics planning, vendor research, contract review, and communications, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and productivity gains. However, the core of the job requires physical site inspections, real-time on-site problem solving during events, and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation and relationship management, which provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 金属和塑料机床操作工
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量物理操作，如设置和操作机床。虽然AI和CNC自动化正在提高效率，但手动设置、质量检查和材料处理的物理要求提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the work is physical and requires presence on a factory floor to handle materials and maintain machinery. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of handling the digital aspects of the job, such as CNC programming, machine monitoring, and quality inspection, which is already contributing to a projected decline in employment.

title: 微生物学家
exposure_rationale: 微生物学家从事大量数字知识工作，包括数据分析、实验设计和报告撰写，AI在这些领域能力强大。然而，物理实验室工作如培养微生物和进行实验提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Microbiologists have a high exposure to AI because a significant portion of their work involves data analysis, pattern recognition in genetic sequences, and technical reporting—all areas where AI is rapidly advancing. However, the physical requirement to conduct laboratory experiments, maintain biological cultures, and collect field samples provides a substantial buffer against full automation.

title: 初中教师
exposure_rationale: 与高中教师类似，课程规划、评分和内容创作等核心数字任务极易受到AI的影响。然而，管理青少年行为、提供情感支持和维持课堂纪律的物理存在要求为全面自动化提供了屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: Middle school teachers have high exposure because a significant portion of their workload—lesson planning, grading, and content creation—is digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for classroom management, emotional support for adolescents, and real-time interpersonal interaction, which provides a substantial buffer against full automation.

title: 军事职业
exposure_rationale: 军事职业涵盖广泛的角色，从高度物理化的战斗和体力任务到可被AI增强的后勤和情报分析。总体暴露度反映了物理战斗任务（低暴露）和数字支持角色（高暴露）之间的平衡。
exposure_rationale_en: Military careers are a vast composite of physical combat, manual labor, and high-level digital strategy. While AI will heavily automate back-office administration, logistics, and intelligence analysis (high exposure), the core requirements of physical presence, tactical human leadership, and operation in unpredictable physical environments provide a significant buffer.

title: 采矿和地质工程师
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了数字设计工作和物理现场存在。虽然AI可以优化矿山设计、安全监控和资源估算，但现场检查和安全管理的物理要求提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Mining and geological engineering involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including mine design, technical reporting, and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains. However, the role also requires substantial physical presence for site evaluations, safety inspections, and supervising construction in remote, unpredictable environments, which provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 模特
exposure_rationale: 虽然AI生成的虚拟模特正在数字广告和电子商务中兴起，但现场走秀、实体拍摄和品牌代言仍需人类模特的物理存在。该职业面临来自数字替代的中等威胁。
exposure_rationale_en: While runway and live event modeling require physical presence, the majority of modeling work results in digital or print imagery which is highly vulnerable to AI-generated synthetic media. AI can now create hyper-realistic virtual models or 'digital twins' of existing models, allowing brands to showcase clothing and products without physical photo shoots, significantly reducing the demand for human labor in commercial and catalog sectors.

title: 音乐总监和作曲家
exposure_rationale: 作曲和音乐制作日益数字化，生成式AI已能创作音乐、编曲和制作伴奏。虽然现场指挥和艺术诠释需要人类存在，但核心创作工作面临显著的AI影响。
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of high-exposure digital work (composing) and lower-exposure physical work (conducting). Generative AI is rapidly automating music composition, arrangement, and scoring for commercial media, while the music director role remains more resilient due to the need for live leadership, physical rehearsals, and human-to-human artistic interpretation.

title: 音乐家和歌手
exposure_rationale: 现场表演是该职业的核心，需要物理存在和人类艺术表达。虽然AI可以生成录音室品质的音乐和模拟人声，但现场音乐的娱乐价值和情感连接仍然以人为核心。
exposure_rationale_en: While AI can generate high-quality digital music and vocals, a significant portion of this occupation involves live performance, physical presence at venues, and human-centric events like religious services and concerts. The 'human element' and the physical act of playing an instrument or singing in real-time provide a natural barrier, though AI will increasingly compete for studio/session work and background music production.

title: 自然科学管理人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业主要是数字知识工作和管理决策的结合。虽然AI可以显著协助数据分析、研究规划和预算管理，但领导科研团队和制定战略方向需要人类判断和人际技能。
exposure_rationale_en: This role is predominantly knowledge-based, involving data analysis, budgeting, and technical reporting, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. While the job requires significant human-centric leadership and physical oversight of laboratories, AI will drastically increase productivity in reviewing research, drafting operational reports, and optimizing resource allocation.

title: 网络和计算机系统管理员
exposure_rationale: 该职业完全数字化，涉及网络配置、系统监控和安全管理等AI可以大量自动化的任务。虽然物理硬件维护和复杂故障排除仍需人类，但常规管理任务正被AI工具快速替代。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is primarily digital and involves tasks like configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting that are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and 'infrastructure as code' practices. While some physical hardware maintenance remains, the shift toward cloud computing and AI-powered network management tools is already leading to a projected decline in employment as fewer workers can manage larger, more complex systems.

title: 新闻分析师、记者
exposure_rationale: 新闻工作涉及大量数字知识工作，如研究、写作和数据分析，AI在这些领域能力很强。然而，实地采访、调查报道和维护新闻可信度需要人类判断和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core work product is digital (text, scripts, and multimedia), and AI can already automate significant portions of research, drafting, and editing. While physical presence for field reporting and the cultivation of human sources provide a protective barrier, the overall occupation faces high exposure as AI tools drastically increase individual productivity, potentially leading to further industry consolidation and fewer required roles.

title: 核工程师
exposure_rationale: 核工程涉及高度复杂的数字模拟和分析工作，AI可以显著增强。然而，严格的安全要求、物理设施检查和高风险决策的人类责任提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Nuclear engineering is a high-level knowledge profession where core tasks—such as reactor design, dose calculations, and safety simulations—are performed using digital tools and complex mathematical modeling. While the high-stakes regulatory environment and the need for physical inspections at power plants provide a buffer, AI is rapidly advancing in its ability to optimize designs, analyze sensor data for predictive maintenance, and automate technical documentation.

title: 核医学技师
exposure_rationale: 该职业需要大量物理存在来操作成像设备和与患者互动。虽然AI正在快速推进图像分析能力，但准备和给予放射性药物以及患者护理的物理要求限制了总体暴露度。
exposure_rationale_en: The role requires significant physical presence to prepare and administer radiopharmaceuticals, operate heavy machinery, and physically assist or position patients. While AI will likely automate the digital aspects of the job—such as optimizing image quality, calculating dosages, and streamlining record-keeping—the core clinical and manual tasks remain insulated from full automation.

title: 核技术员
exposure_rationale: 该角色结合了数字数据监控和物理设备操作。虽然AI可以增强辐射监测和数据分析，但在核设施中操作和维护设备的物理要求提供了显著的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: Nuclear technicians perform a mix of digital monitoring and physical labor, such as collecting environmental samples and maintaining hardware. While AI can significantly automate the data analysis, radiation calculation, and system monitoring aspects of the role, the requirement for physical presence in hazardous environments and the manual calibration of equipment provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 麻醉护士、助产士和执业护士
exposure_rationale: 这些高级护理角色需要大量物理存在来进行患者评估、执行程序和提供紧急护理。虽然AI将增强诊断支持和药物管理，但核心临床工作仍然是深度物理化和人际化的。
title_en: Nurse anesthetists, nurse midwives, and nurse practitioners
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation involves a significant amount of high-level knowledge work, such as diagnosing conditions and analyzing test results, which is highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for exams, procedures (like delivering babies or administering anesthesia), and complex interpersonal communication that provides a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 护理助理和护工
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心职责——搬运患者、协助沐浴和进食、维护病房——几乎完全是物理化的。AI的影响仅限于文档记录和排程等辅助任务，核心体力劳动无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of nursing assistants and orderlies—such as bathing, dressing, and physically transferring patients—are highly manual and require real-time human presence in unpredictable physical environments. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like recording vital signs or scheduling, the primary work product is physical care and interpersonal support, which remains largely insulated from AI automation.

title: 职业健康和安全专家及技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了数字知识工作（法规分析、报告撰写、数据收集）和物理现场检查。虽然AI可以自动化大量数据分析和合规检查工作，但现场安全检查和员工培训的物理要求提供了缓冲。
title_en: Occupational health and safety specialists and technicians
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. While AI can significantly automate data analysis, report writing, and regulatory cross-referencing, the core duties require physical inspections of worksites, manual testing with specialized equipment, and real-time human interaction to conduct safety trainings and emergency investigations.

title: 职业治疗师
exposure_rationale: 职业治疗的核心需要物理存在来评估患者能力、指导康复活动和改装辅助设备。虽然AI可以协助治疗计划制定和进展跟踪，但动手的治疗干预无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: Occupational therapy is a highly physical and interpersonal profession that requires real-time observation, manual manipulation of patients, and the assessment of physical environments like homes and workplaces. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks such as treatment planning, progress documentation, and medical history analysis, the core of the job involves hands-on rehabilitation and emotional support that cannot be replicated digitally.

title: 职业治疗助理
exposure_rationale: 该角色主要是物理化的，协助患者进行日常活动训练和康复练习。虽然AI可以协助记录和计划辅助任务，但核心的物理患者互动工作抵抗自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical assistance, manual therapy, and real-time human interaction, such as lifting patients and guiding motor skill exercises, which AI cannot perform. While AI can streamline administrative tasks like scheduling, documentation, and billing, the primary value of the role is rooted in physical presence and empathetic interpersonal support.

title: 石油和天然气工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业是高度物理化的，涉及在偏远和危险环境中操作钻探设备和维护管道。虽然AI可以优化钻探参数和增强安全监控，但核心体力劳动无法被AI替代。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves heavy physical labor, equipment maintenance, and manual operation in unpredictable outdoor environments, which provides a strong buffer against AI. However, the industry is increasingly adopting automated drilling technologies and remote monitoring systems that improve productivity, meaning fewer human workers may be required to achieve the same output.

title: 运筹学分析师
exposure_rationale: 运筹学分析是完全数字化的职业，核心任务——数学建模、数据分析和优化算法——与AI能力高度一致。虽然需要人类判断来解读结果和制定建议，但大量技术工作极易受到自动化影响。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving data collection, mathematical modeling, and report writing—all areas where AI and Large Language Models excel. While analysts still provide high-level human judgment and stakeholder persuasion, AI can now automate the core technical tasks of coding analytical tools, mining data, and generating optimization simulations, significantly increasing individual productivity and restructuring the role.

title: 配镜师
exposure_rationale: 配镜师的工作结合了物理任务（调整镜架、验配隐形眼镜）和数字记录保持。虽然AI可能协助处方解读和库存管理，但动手的验配和调整工作需要人类存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The role involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on work such as measuring faces, adjusting frames with tools, and teaching patients how to insert contact lenses. While AI can automate administrative tasks and assist in frame selection via virtual try-on technology, the core requirements of physical fitting, manual repairs, and real-time interpersonal healthcare guidance provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 验光师
exposure_rationale: 验光的核心需要物理存在来进行眼科检查和使用诊断设备。虽然AI将增强图像分析和疾病筛查，但物理检查和患者互动的需求提供了显著的保护。
exposure_rationale_en: Optometry is a hybrid of physical clinical procedures and high-level data analysis. AI is highly effective at analyzing retinal scans and diagnostic data to identify diseases, which will significantly augment the diagnostic process; however, the core role requires physical presence for eye exams, minor surgical procedures, and the fitting of corrective lenses, which provides a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 矫形器和假肢技师
exposure_rationale: 该职业高度依赖物理技能来设计、制造和验配矫形器和假肢。虽然AI和3D打印正在改变设计阶段，但为每位患者定制验配和调整的动手工作仍然是以人为核心的。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on work including patient examinations, manual measurements, and the physical fabrication or adjustment of medical devices. While AI and computer-aided design (CAD) can greatly enhance the diagnostic and design phases, the core requirements of real-time human interaction, physical dexterity, and clinical judgment in a healthcare setting provide a strong barrier to full automation.

title: 油漆工（建筑维修）
exposure_rationale: 油漆工的核心工作是高度物理化的，涉及在不同表面和环境中的手工操作。AI对该职业的影响极为有限，可能仅涉及颜色匹配或工作量估算等辅助任务。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are entirely physical, requiring manual dexterity, mobility at heights, and real-time adaptation to unpredictable physical environments. While AI might assist with peripheral business tasks like estimating or scheduling, it cannot perform the labor-intensive tasks of surface preparation and paint application.

title: 喷涂和涂装工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及在工厂环境中操作涂装设备和进行质量检查。虽然自动化涂装系统正在发展，但手动操作和质量控制的物理要求在许多应用中仍需人类参与。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and presence in industrial or repair environments, which provides a natural barrier to AI. While AI and computer vision can enhance automated spray systems and quality control sensors, the need for human workers to set up equipment, prepare surfaces, and perform manual touch-ups in unpredictable repair settings remains significant.

title: 律师助理和法律助理
exposure_rationale: 律师助理从事高度数字化的工作，涉及法律研究、文件起草和案件组织——大语言模型非常擅长的领域。虽然该角色需要一定的人际互动和专业判断，但核心的信息处理任务面临极高的AI自动化风险。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation—legal research, document drafting, and information organization—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with the strengths of Large Language Models. While some interpersonal and courtroom logistics remain, AI can already automate or significantly accelerate the vast majority of a paralegal's workload, leading to the BLS's projection of 0% job growth despite high demand for legal services.

title: 个人理财顾问
exposure_rationale: 个人理财咨询涉及大量数字化的数据分析和财务规划工作，AI在此领域能力强大。然而，建立客户信任关系和提供情感支持（特别是在市场波动期间）的人际方面提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: The core technical tasks of this role—analyzing market data, optimizing portfolios, and tax planning—are digital and highly susceptible to AI automation, as evidenced by the rise of robo-advisors. However, the occupation is protected by a significant interpersonal component, as clients often require human trust, emotional reassurance during market volatility, and complex ethical judgment that AI cannot yet fully replicate.

title: 害虫防治工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心是物理化的，需要亲身到不同环境中检查和施用化学品。虽然AI可能协助害虫识别和最优处理方案推荐，但核心的现场工作无法被远程自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring workers to crawl into tight spaces, set manual traps, and apply chemicals in unpredictable real-world environments. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like route optimization, pest identification from photos, or automated billing, the primary labor cannot be performed digitally or remotely.

title: 石油工程师
exposure_rationale: 石油工程涉及大量数字模拟和数据分析，AI在优化钻探和生产方面能力很强。然而，现场检查和危险环境中的决策需要物理存在和人类判断。
exposure_rationale_en: Petroleum engineering involves significant digital knowledge work, such as reservoir modeling, data analysis, and drilling simulation, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization and automation. However, the role remains anchored by the necessity of physical site visits to remote or offshore locations to oversee equipment installation and troubleshoot real-world mechanical issues that AI cannot physically address.

title: 药剂师
exposure_rationale: 药剂师的工作日益依赖数字系统来进行药物相互作用检查和处方验证，AI在此领域很有能力。然而，患者咨询、疫苗接种和临床判断的人际和物理方面提供了对全面自动化的保护。
exposure_rationale_en: Pharmacists face moderate exposure because their core knowledge-based tasks—checking drug interactions, verifying dosages, and analyzing patient records—are highly susceptible to AI automation and digital optimization. However, the role remains anchored by physical requirements such as administering immunizations, performing clinical rounds, and providing real-time, empathetic patient counseling that requires human trust and physical presence.

title: 药剂技术员
exposure_rationale: 该角色涉及物理化的药物分发和数字化的处方处理。虽然自动化配药系统正在发展，但库存管理和客户服务的物理方面在许多环境中仍需人类参与。
exposure_rationale_en: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as measuring medications, packaging prescriptions, and interacting with patients in person, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI and automated dispensing systems are highly capable of handling the information-processing tasks like insurance claims, inventory management, and prescription data entry, which constitute a large portion of the daily workload.

title: 采血师
exposure_rationale: 采血是一个高度物理化的职业，需要手工灵巧性和与患者的直接物理接触。AI对核心工作的影响极小，可能仅限于样本追踪和文档记录等辅助功能。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job is a highly tactile, physical procedure (venipuncture) performed on human patients in unpredictable clinical settings, which is resistant to AI automation. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like data entry, sample tracking, and scheduling, the primary value of the role lies in manual dexterity and providing interpersonal emotional support to anxious patients.

title: 摄影师
exposure_rationale: 摄影日益数字化，AI在图像编辑、增强和甚至图像生成方面能力极强。虽然现场拍摄需要物理存在和艺术判断，但后期制作的大量工作面临显著的AI自动化影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Photography is a hybrid role where the physical act of capturing real-world events (weddings, news, portraits) provides a buffer, but the digital output is highly vulnerable to AI. Generative AI can now create high-quality commercial and stock imagery from scratch and automate complex post-production tasks, significantly reducing the billable hours and demand for professional photographers in commercial and creative sectors.

title: 物理治疗助理
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及协助患者进行物理练习和治疗活动，需要动手操作和物理存在。虽然AI可以协助治疗记录和进展跟踪，但核心的患者互动工作抵抗自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical, hands-on work such as massage, stretching, and assisting patients with mobility, which AI cannot perform. While AI can streamline peripheral tasks like scheduling, documentation, and exercise plan generation, the requirement for real-time human presence and physical dexterity creates a strong barrier to automation.

title: 物理治疗师
exposure_rationale: 物理治疗的核心需要物理存在来评估患者、指导运动和进行手动治疗。虽然AI可以协助运动处方和康复计划制定，但动手的治疗工作和实时患者评估无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of physical therapy involves manual manipulation, physical assistance, and real-time observation of human movement in a physical environment, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with administrative tasks, medical history review, and generating personalized exercise plans, the high level of physical dexterity and interpersonal empathy required limits its overall exposure.

title: 医师助理
exposure_rationale: 医师助理的工作需要大量物理存在来进行患者检查、执行程序和提供临床护理。虽然AI将增强诊断支持和治疗建议，但核心临床工作仍然深度依赖人类的物理存在和判断。
exposure_rationale_en: Physician assistants perform a mix of high-level knowledge work and physical clinical tasks. While AI will significantly augment diagnostic accuracy, treatment planning, and administrative documentation, the role requires physical presence for examinations, surgical procedures, and hands-on treatments like stitching wounds, as well as complex interpersonal counseling that is difficult to automate.

title: 医生和外科医生
exposure_rationale: 医学实践的核心涉及物理检查、手术操作和复杂的临床决策。虽然AI正在革新诊断影像分析、药物发现和临床决策支持，但手术技能、患者关系和高风险决策的伦理/法律责任使该职业的物理组件对自动化有强大的抵抗力。
exposure_rationale_en: Physicians and surgeons have moderate exposure because while AI can significantly automate digital tasks like diagnostic image interpretation (radiology), medical history analysis, and treatment planning, the core of the job requires physical presence, manual dexterity for procedures, and complex interpersonal communication. The high-stakes nature of medical liability and the need for human empathy in patient care provide a natural barrier to full automation, though AI will drastically increase productivity in information-heavy specialties.

title: 物理学家和天文学家
exposure_rationale: 该职业是高度数字化的知识工作，涉及数据分析、数学建模和模拟——AI擅长的领域。虽然物理实验室工作和天文观测需要人类存在，但大量计算和分析工作极易受到AI增强的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Physicists and astronomers perform high-level knowledge work that is increasingly digital, including data analysis, mathematical modeling, and software development. While AI significantly accelerates data processing and literature review, the core requirements of original theoretical innovation, experimental design, and complex physical-world problem solving provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 管道工
exposure_rationale: 管道工的核心工作是高度物理化的，涉及在狭窄空间中安装和维修管道系统。AI可能协助蓝图分析或管路计算等辅助任务，但物理安装和维修工作需要人类的灵巧性和存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable physical environments like crawl spaces and construction sites. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like cost estimation, blueprint analysis via BIM, and scheduling, it cannot perform the essential hands-on installation and repair work.

title: 足病医生
exposure_rationale: 足病医学的核心涉及物理检查和手术程序，需要手工灵巧性和直接的患者接触。虽然AI可能增强诊断支持，但物理治疗工作抵抗自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: Podiatry is a medical specialty that requires significant physical presence for exams, manual procedures, and complex surgeries that AI cannot perform. However, AI will heavily impact the knowledge-based aspects of the role, such as analyzing X-rays, diagnosing conditions from medical history, and automating clinical documentation and administrative tasks.

title: 警察和侦探
exposure_rationale: 执法工作结合了物理巡逻和数字化的案件调查。虽然AI可以增强监控分析、犯罪预测和报告撰写，但逮捕嫌疑人、维护公共安全和社区互动的物理要求提供了强大的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job involves physical presence, emergency response, and manual tasks like making arrests and patrolling, which are resistant to AI. However, a significant portion of the work involves digital tasks such as writing detailed reports, searching databases, and analyzing evidence, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and efficiency gains.

title: 政治学家
exposure_rationale: 政治学家从事高度数字化的研究和写作工作，数据分析和文献综合极易受到AI影响。虽然对政治制度的深层理解和实地调研需要人类判断，但核心的分析和写作工作面临显著的AI生产力提升。
exposure_rationale_en: Political science is a purely digital knowledge-work occupation centered on data analysis, research, and writing, all of which are core strengths of generative AI and LLMs. While high-level strategic judgment and interpersonal networking remain human-centric, AI can now automate the collection of public opinion data, the drafting of policy briefs, and the forecasting of political trends, leading to significant productivity gains and a projected decline in total employment.

title: 邮政服务工人
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了物理化的邮件分拣和投递与数字化的追踪系统。虽然自动分拣技术已经在替代部分工作，但最后一公里投递和客户服务的物理要求在近期仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, such as delivering parcels and navigating outdoor environments, which provides a natural barrier to AI. However, AI and advanced automation are significantly impacting the sorting and processing components of the job, while the shift toward digital communication reduces overall mail volume and labor demand.

title: 高等教育管理人员
exposure_rationale: 高等教育管理大量涉及数字知识工作，如预算管理、招生数据分析和政策制定，极易受到AI增强的影响。然而，学生事务管理和利益相关者关系维护的人际方面提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is heavily centered on digital information processing, including reviewing applications, analyzing student data, managing budgets, and maintaining academic records—all tasks where AI can significantly increase productivity or automate routine workflows. While roles like deans and student affairs officers require high-level human judgment and interpersonal relationship management, the underlying administrative and analytical work is highly susceptible to AI integration and restructuring.

title: 高校教师
exposure_rationale: 高校教师从事高度数字化的知识工作，包括课程设计、研究和论文写作。虽然课堂教学和学生指导的人际方面提供了保护，但核心的研究和内容创作工作极易受到AI增强的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Postsecondary teaching is primarily knowledge work involving research, writing, and curriculum design—all areas where AI is highly capable. While the role requires significant human interaction and mentorship, AI can automate grading, lesson planning, and literature reviews, potentially increasing individual productivity to the point of restructuring faculty needs.

title: 发电厂操作员和调度员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了物理设备操作和数字化的系统监控。虽然AI可以优化电网调度和预测设备故障，但操作物理设备和应对紧急情况的要求仍需人类存在。
title_en: Power plant operators, distributors, and dispatchers
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of monitoring data, adjusting power flows, and responding to system abnormalities are increasingly digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and smart-grid optimization. While the high-stakes nature of power infrastructure and the need for physical equipment inspections provide a buffer, the BLS already projects a 10% decline in employment due to technological advances and automated control rooms.

title: 幼儿园和托儿所主任
exposure_rationale: 该角色涉及数字化的行政管理和物理化的设施监督。虽然AI可以协助预算管理和合规文档，但确保儿童安全和管理教职员工的物理存在要求无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: This role is a hybrid of administrative knowledge work and high-stakes physical presence. While AI can significantly automate digital tasks like budgeting, scheduling, and curriculum planning, the core of the job involves physical facility oversight, staff supervision, and building trust-based relationships with parents and children that cannot be replicated by AI.

title: 学前教育教师
exposure_rationale: 学前教育的核心需要物理存在来监护幼儿、提供情感支持和引导发展活动。虽然AI可能协助课程规划，但该年龄段的教育高度依赖人类的温暖和物理互动。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical care, emotional support, and real-time social interaction with children under age five, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like lesson planning, curriculum design, and progress reporting, the primary job requires physical presence and human empathy to manage safety and developmental needs.

title: 私人侦探和调查员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了数字化的信息收集和物理化的监控与现场调查。虽然AI可以显著增强数据分析和背景调查，但实地跟踪和证人访谈的物理要求提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of digital research and physical field work. AI significantly enhances the digital aspects—such as background checks, social media analysis, and report writing—making investigators much more productive, but the core requirements of physical surveillance, in-person interviews, and undercover store work provide a substantial barrier to full automation.

title: 缓刑官和矫正治疗专家
exposure_rationale: 该角色需要大量物理存在来监督罪犯、进行家访和确保公共安全。虽然AI可以协助风险评估和报告撰写，但核心的人际干预和物理监督工作无法被自动化。
title_en: Probation officers and correctional treatment specialists
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of high-exposure digital tasks (writing case reports, risk assessment, and data-driven monitoring) and low-exposure physical/interpersonal tasks (home visits, drug testing, and building trust with hostile clients). While AI can significantly automate documentation and predictive risk modeling, the legal requirement for human testimony and the physical necessity of community supervision provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 制片人和导演
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了高度数字化的后期制作和需要物理存在的现场指导。虽然AI正在自动化视频编辑和内容生成，但创意决策、团队领导和现场协调仍需人类判断和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: Producers and directors are highly exposed because their core work products—scripts, visual aesthetics, and edited video—are increasingly being generated or enhanced by AI tools. While the role requires significant human leadership and physical presence on set, the rapid advancement of generative AI in pre-production (scripting/storyboarding) and post-production (editing/VFX) allows a single director to do the work of a much larger team, potentially consolidating the industry.

title: 项目管理专员
exposure_rationale: 项目管理大量涉及数字知识工作，如调度、预算跟踪和报告撰写，AI在这些领域很有能力。然而，团队协调和利益相关者管理的人际方面提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Project management is a digital-heavy knowledge occupation involving data analysis, scheduling, and documentation, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. While AI can significantly increase productivity in planning and monitoring, the role's heavy reliance on human-centric skills like stakeholder negotiation, conflict resolution, and team leadership provides a protective barrier against full automation.

title: 房产估价师和评估员
exposure_rationale: 房产估价涉及数字化的数据分析和物理化的现场检查。虽然AI可以自动化市场数据比较和初步估值，但对每处房产的物理检查仍需人类存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves analyzing data, comparing market trends, and generating reports, all of which are highly susceptible to Automated Valuation Models (AVMs) and AI-driven data analysis. While physical site inspections and the need to defend assessments in public hearings provide a buffer, the shift toward 'desktop appraisals' and AI-assisted mass assessments significantly reduces the human labor required per valuation.

title: 物业和房地产管理人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了数字化的财务管理和物理化的设施监督。虽然AI可以自动化租金收取和财务报告，但设施检查和租户纠纷处理的物理和人际方面提供了保护。
title_en: Property, real estate, and community association managers
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical site management. While AI can automate significant portions of the job—such as drafting leases, financial reporting, budgeting, and coordinating maintenance requests—the role still requires physical inspections of facilities and high-stakes interpersonal conflict resolution. The exposure is high because the administrative and analytical 'office' tasks that comprise a large part of the day are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains.

title: 精神科技术员和助理
exposure_rationale: 该角色涉及大量与精神健康患者的物理互动和照护。虽然AI可能协助记录和监控，但提供直接患者护理和维护安全环境的物理要求无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks such as bathing, feeding, and physically restraining patients, which AI cannot perform. While AI can assist with monitoring patient behavior and automating documentation or reporting, the high requirement for real-time human presence, physical stamina, and interpersonal compassion creates a significant barrier to automation.

title: 心理学家
exposure_rationale: 心理学家的工作结合了高度数字化的研究和评估与面对面的治疗互动。虽然AI可以辅助测试评分和文献综述，但治疗关系中的人类共情和临床判断是该职业的核心，难以被AI替代。
exposure_rationale_en: Psychology is a knowledge-based profession where core tasks like analyzing data, writing reports, and researching are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. However, the critical requirements for human empathy, ethical judgment, and real-time interpersonal observation in clinical and school settings create a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 公共关系和筹款经理
exposure_rationale: 该职业大量涉及数字化的沟通策略和内容创作，AI在这些领域能力很强。虽然高层次的关系管理和危机沟通需要人类判断，但大量的分析和内容生成工作极易受到AI自动化的影响。
exposure_rationale_en: The core digital tasks of this role—writing press releases, drafting speeches, analyzing social media trends, and creating fundraising strategies—are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. However, the role's heavy reliance on high-stakes interpersonal relationships, such as face-to-face donor meetings and managing media crises, provides a significant human-centric buffer that prevents a higher score.

title: 公共关系专员
exposure_rationale: 公关专员从事高度数字化的工作，包括内容创作、媒体监测和数据分析——大语言模型擅长的领域。虽然媒体关系和危机管理的人际方面提供了缓冲，但核心的写作和分析任务面临显著的AI影响。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of this occupation—writing press releases, drafting speeches, creating social media content, and monitoring public sentiment—are digital-first and align perfectly with the capabilities of Large Language Models. While high-level strategy and real-time interpersonal crisis management provide some protection, the vast majority of the daily work product can be generated or significantly optimized by AI, leading to high exposure and potential workforce consolidation.

title: 公共安全通信调度员
exposure_rationale: 该职业主要涉及信息处理和通信调度，AI可以增强呼叫分类和资源调配。然而，在紧急情况下提供冷静指导和做出高风险判断的需求确保了人类调度员的持续必要性。
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of this role—receiving digital inputs (voice, text, video), processing information according to protocols, and dispatching resources—are highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the high-stakes nature and need for human empathy provide a temporary buffer, AI's ability to transcribe, translate, and prioritize emergency calls in real-time will significantly restructure the occupation and increase individual worker productivity.

title: 采购经理和采购代理
exposure_rationale: 采购工作大量涉及数字化的价格分析、供应商评估和合同管理，AI在这些领域很有能力。虽然供应商谈判和关系管理的人际方面提供了缓冲，但核心的分析和交易处理工作极易受到自动化影响。
title_en: Purchasing managers, buyers, and purchasing agents
exposure_rationale_en: The core tasks of analyzing price proposals, monitoring inventory, and reviewing financial reports are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. While high-stakes negotiations and physical site visits provide a buffer, the majority of the work is digital information processing that can be significantly streamlined by AI, leading to higher productivity per worker and a restructuring of the procurement process.

title: 质量控制检查员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了物理化的产品检查和数字化的数据记录。虽然计算机视觉和AI正在快速自动化视觉检查任务，但许多检查仍需要人类的触觉评估和在不同环境中的物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of physical inspection and data analysis. While AI-powered computer vision systems are rapidly automating the visual detection of defects, the role still requires significant physical presence to handle materials, operate manual gauges, and perform mechanical tests that robots cannot yet fully replicate in diverse manufacturing environments.

title: 放射治疗师
exposure_rationale: 该职业需要物理存在来定位患者和操作治疗设备。虽然AI可以优化治疗计划和剂量计算，但直接的患者护理和设备操作的物理要求提供了保护。
