exposure_rationale_en: The role requires a significant physical presence to position patients, operate heavy machinery, and provide empathetic interpersonal care during serious illness. While AI will heavily automate the digital aspects of the job—such as tumor localization, treatment planning, and dosage calculations—the physical and clinical safety requirements create a substantial barrier to full automation.

title: 放射科和MRI技师
exposure_rationale: 该角色涉及大量物理任务，如定位患者和操作成像设备。虽然AI正在快速推进图像分析能力，但设备操作和患者互动的物理要求限制了总体暴露度。
exposure_rationale_en: While AI is revolutionizing image analysis and quality control, the core of this role requires physical presence to position patients, administer contrast agents, and operate heavy machinery in a clinical setting. AI will significantly enhance productivity and image evaluation, but the physical and interpersonal requirements of patient care provide a substantial barrier to full automation.

title: 铁路工人
exposure_rationale: 铁路工作涉及大量物理劳动，包括轨道维护、设备操作和信号管理。虽然AI可以优化调度和增强安全监控，但核心的物理维护和操作工作仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, mechanical adjustment, and real-world safety monitoring that AI cannot perform. However, core functions like train operation, scheduling, and signal management are increasingly susceptible to automation and AI-driven efficiency systems, which the BLS notes is already limiting employment growth.

title: 房地产经纪人
exposure_rationale: 房地产销售涉及大量数字化的市场分析和营销工作，AI在这些领域能力很强。然而，带看房产、建立客户关系和进行复杂谈判的物理和人际方面提供了对全面自动化的保护。
title_en: Real estate brokers and sales agents
exposure_rationale_en: Real estate agents perform a mix of digital knowledge work and physical/interpersonal tasks. AI can automate significant portions of their digital workload, such as market analysis, property descriptions, lead generation, and contract preparation, which increases individual productivity and may reduce the total number of agents needed. However, the core of the job still requires physical property showings, high-stakes human negotiation, and local networking, which provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 前台接待员
exposure_rationale: 前台接待的核心任务——接听电话、安排预约和数据录入——大量是数字化和常规的，极易受到AI自动化影响。虽然迎接访客和处理物理邮件等任务仍需人类存在，但AI聊天机器人和自动化系统正在快速替代信息处理功能。
exposure_rationale_en: Many core tasks such as scheduling, answering phones, and data entry are highly susceptible to automation via AI voice agents and chatbots. While the role retains a physical component for greeting and security, the BLS already projects zero growth due to automation, and the digital nature of the administrative workload makes it highly exposed to further restructuring.

title: 休闲娱乐工作者
exposure_rationale: 该职业主要需要物理存在来组织活动、监督参与者和维护设施。虽然AI可能协助活动规划和排程，但核心的人际互动和物理活动引导工作无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical presence, manual instruction, and real-time interpersonal interaction in unpredictable environments like camps and community centers. While AI can assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling, program planning, and creating newsletters, it cannot replace the physical supervision, safety monitoring, and emotional leadership required to manage group activities.

title: 娱乐治疗师
exposure_rationale: 娱乐治疗需要物理存在来引导治疗活动和评估患者进展。虽然AI可以协助治疗计划制定，但动手的治疗互动和实时患者评估是该职业的核心。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical presence, manual assistance, and real-time interpersonal interaction through activities like adaptive sports, dance, and community outings. While AI can significantly assist with digital tasks like patient assessment, treatment planning, and progress documentation, it cannot replace the physical and emotional labor required to lead therapeutic interventions in person.

title: 注册护士
exposure_rationale: 注册护士的核心工作需要大量物理存在来进行患者评估、执行医疗程序和提供紧急护理。虽然AI将增强诊断支持和文档管理，但直接的患者护理工作——包括静脉注射、伤口护理和患者安慰——需要人类的物理存在和判断。
exposure_rationale_en: Registered nursing is a hybrid role that combines significant physical labor, such as administering treatments and moving patients, with complex interpersonal care and emotional support. While AI will heavily impact the knowledge-work components—such as patient monitoring, diagnostic analysis, and care planning—the core requirement for physical presence and human empathy creates a strong barrier to full automation.

title: 康复咨询师
exposure_rationale: 康复咨询结合了数字化的案例管理和面对面的咨询服务。虽然AI可以协助资源匹配和文档处理，但建立信任关系和提供情感支持的人际方面是该职业的核心。
exposure_rationale_en: Rehabilitation counseling involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as developing rehabilitation plans, maintaining records, and researching resources, which are highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core of the profession relies on high-stakes interpersonal interaction, empathy, and physical advocacy for clients with disabilities, creating a natural barrier to full automation.

title: 呼吸治疗师
exposure_rationale: 该职业需要物理存在来操作呼吸设备、执行治疗程序和监测患者状况。虽然AI可以增强设备监控和治疗方案优化，但核心的患者护理工作需要人类的物理存在和临床判断。
exposure_rationale_en: Respiratory therapy involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on patient care, such as performing chest physiotherapy, intubating patients, and maintaining equipment in real-time clinical environments. While AI will heavily assist in diagnostic analysis, ventilator setting optimization, and patient monitoring, the core of the job requires physical presence and interpersonal interaction that cannot be digitized.

title: 零售销售人员
exposure_rationale: 零售销售涉及物理化的客户互动和数字化的交易处理。虽然自助结账和在线购物正在减少对人类销售员的需求，但提供个性化服务和管理实体店面仍需物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: Retail sales involve a mix of physical tasks (stocking shelves, demonstrating products) and interpersonal interaction that provides a barrier to full automation. However, AI is increasingly handling the information-heavy aspects of the job, such as personalized product recommendations, answering technical questions via kiosks/mobile apps, and automating inventory management and checkout processes, which reduces the total human labor required per store.

title: 屋顶工
exposure_rationale: 屋顶工作是高度物理化的，涉及在高处和不利天气条件下的手动劳动。AI对该职业的影响极为有限，仅可能涉及材料估算或检查辅助等边缘任务。
exposure_rationale_en: Roofing is a highly physical occupation performed in unpredictable outdoor environments that require manual dexterity, balance, and heavy lifting. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like drone-based inspections or material estimation, the core work of installing and repairing shingles and membranes remains entirely dependent on human labor.

title: 销售工程师
exposure_rationale: 销售工程结合了高度数字化的技术分析和人际化的客户关系。虽然AI可以自动化技术方案生成和产品配置，但复杂的客户谈判和定制解决方案演示仍需人类判断和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: Sales engineers perform high-level knowledge work that is increasingly digital, including technical presentations, product customization, and troubleshooting. While AI can automate technical documentation, demo generation, and data-driven customer insights, the role's heavy reliance on complex interpersonal relationships, negotiation, and trust-building provides a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 销售经理
exposure_rationale: 销售管理涉及大量数字化的数据分析和战略规划，AI在这些领域能力强大。然而，团队领导、客户关系维护和复杂谈判的人际方面为全面自动化提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Sales managers perform high-level knowledge work including data analysis, sales forecasting, and strategic planning, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal leadership and relationship management, much of the core digital workflow—such as monitoring CRM data, generating reports, and developing training materials—is being rapidly transformed by generative and analytical AI.

title: 学校和职业咨询师
exposure_rationale: 学校咨询结合了数字化的数据分析和面对面的学生指导。虽然AI可以自动化学业数据处理和职业匹配，但为学生提供情感支持和危机干预的人际方面是该职业的核心。
title_en: School and career counselors and advisors
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a mix of high-touch interpersonal work and digital information processing. AI can significantly automate the 'hard' data tasks like analyzing student performance trends, matching aptitudes to career paths, and drafting résumés, but the core functions of emotional support, crisis intervention (reporting abuse), and navigating complex human relationships in a school setting provide a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 秘书和行政助理
exposure_rationale: 秘书和行政助理从事高度数字化和常规化的工作——排程、文件管理、通信处理——所有这些都极易受到AI自动化影响。虽然一些角色涉及物理任务和复杂的人际协调，但核心行政功能正在被AI工具快速重塑。
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation—scheduling, drafting correspondence, managing databases, and transcribing—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with the capabilities of LLMs and AI agents. While some roles require physical presence for visitor greeting or office management, the vast majority of tasks are routine information processing that can be automated or significantly streamlined, leading to major restructuring and reduced headcount per organization.

title: 证券、期货和金融服务销售代理
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字化的市场分析和交易处理，AI在这些领域非常精通。虽然高净值客户关系和复杂产品销售的人际方面提供了缓冲，但常规交易和分析工作面临显著的自动化风险。
title_en: Securities, commodities, and financial services sales agents
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital and information-based, involving data analysis, market monitoring, and financial modeling—all areas where AI is rapidly achieving parity with human experts. While high-level relationship management and complex negotiation (like M&A) provide some insulation, the core tasks of identifying investment opportunities, executing trades, and providing routine financial advice are highly susceptible to automation and significant productivity gains that could reduce the need for human agents.

title: 保安和博彩监控人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心需要物理存在来巡逻、监控和应对安全事件。虽然AI增强的监控系统正在提升效率，但实体安全巡逻和物理干预仍需人类执行。
title_en: Security guards and gambling surveillance officers
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of physical presence and digital monitoring. While AI-powered computer vision is rapidly automating the 'surveillance' and 'monitoring' aspects of the job, the core requirements of physical patrolling, detaining suspects, and responding to real-world emergencies provide a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 半导体加工技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及洁净室环境中精密设备的操作和维护。虽然AI正在优化制造流程和质量控制，但设备操作和物理监控的需求在近期仍需人类技术员。
exposure_rationale_en: The role involves a significant physical component, requiring presence in cleanrooms to handle wafers, maintain equipment, and perform manual inspections. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of monitoring process data, optimizing machine parameters, and performing high-precision quality control, which automates the information-processing and monitoring aspects of the job.

title: 布景和展览设计师
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了数字化的3D设计和物理化的搭建工作。虽然AI可以加速设计概念生成和渲染，但物理空间的搭建和材料选择仍需人类的创意判断和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core creative process—including script analysis, conceptual sketching, and CAD modeling—is increasingly susceptible to generative AI and automated design tools that can rapidly produce 3D environments and visual concepts. While the role requires physical-world considerations like material budgets and on-site installation oversight, the shift toward digital production (such as virtual sets and LED volumes) and AI-assisted drafting significantly increases productivity and reduces the total human labor required per project.

title: 钣金工
exposure_rationale: 钣金工作是高度物理化的，涉及在多种环境中的手动切割、成型和安装。AI可能协助设计读取和材料计算等辅助任务，但核心的物理制造和安装工作抵抗自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and on-site installation in unpredictable construction environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI and computer-controlled machinery (CADD, lasers, and automated presses) are increasingly used in the fabrication phase, the majority of the work—including installation, maintenance, and complex physical maneuvering—cannot be performed by digital tools.

title: 皮肤护理专家
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心涉及直接的物理接触和手工操作来提供面部护理和皮肤治疗。虽然AI可能协助产品推荐和皮肤分析，但动手的治疗服务仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job involves physical, hands-on treatments like facials, massages, and hair removal that require real-time human presence and manual dexterity. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like skin analysis, product recommendations, and business management, it cannot replace the tactile and interpersonal nature of the primary service.

title: 小型发动机机械师
exposure_rationale: 小型发动机维修是高度物理化的，需要手工灵巧性和在各种设备上的故障排除。虽然AI可以增强诊断能力，但物理维修工作仍然是以人为核心的手动任务。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical manipulation of mechanical components, manual dexterity, and real-world troubleshooting in unpredictable environments. While AI can assist with diagnostic software and technical documentation, it cannot perform the physical labor of disassembling engines, replacing parts, or conducting hands-on repairs.

title: 社会和社区服务管理人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量行政和数据分析工作，AI可以显著增强。然而，社区外展、员工管理和服务对象互动的人际和物理方面为全面自动化提供了保护。
exposure_rationale_en: This role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as grant writing, data analysis, and budget management, which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core responsibilities of community stakeholder engagement, staff supervision, and navigating complex human crises provide a buffer that requires physical presence and high-level emotional intelligence.

title: 社会和人类服务助理
exposure_rationale: 该角色结合了数字化的案例管理和面对面的客户服务。虽然AI可以协助文档处理和资源匹配，但与弱势群体的直接人际互动和倡导工作需要人类的同理心和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of digital administrative work and high-touch interpersonal service. AI can significantly automate the 'knowledge work' components, such as researching community resources, assisting with complex benefit applications, and coordinating service schedules. However, the core of the job requires physical presence in homes or clinics and deep emotional intelligence to support clients in crisis, which provides a substantial buffer against full automation.

title: 社会工作者
exposure_rationale: 社会工作的核心建立在人际信任、同理心和对复杂人类处境的判断之上。虽然AI可以协助案例文档和资源匹配，但家访、危机干预和客户倡导的物理和情感方面无法被自动化。
exposure_rationale_en: Social work involves a high degree of interpersonal interaction, empathy, and crisis management in physical environments, which provides a strong barrier against full automation. However, AI will significantly impact the profession by automating administrative tasks like case documentation, assisting in resource research, and providing diagnostic support tools for clinical practitioners.

title: 社会学家
exposure_rationale: 社会学家从事高度数字化的研究工作，数据分析和报告撰写极易受到AI影响。虽然实地研究和对社会现象的深层解读需要人类判断，但核心的统计分析和文献综合工作面临显著的AI增强。
exposure_rationale_en: Sociology is a knowledge-intensive field where core tasks like data analysis, literature reviews, and report writing are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. While qualitative field research and interpersonal interviews provide a buffer, the shift toward digital data collection and AI-driven statistical modeling significantly increases worker productivity and reshapes the research process.

title: 软件开发人员和测试人员
exposure_rationale: 该职业的核心任务——编写代码、设计系统和测试软件——完全数字化且与大语言模型的能力高度一致。虽然高层架构决策和团队协作需要人类判断，但AI已经能够自动化大量的编码、调试和测试工作，显著提高个人生产力并重组该行业的劳动力需求。
title_en: Software developers, quality assurance analysts, and testers
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is fundamentally digital, with core tasks like coding, debugging, and test automation being primary use cases for Large Language Models. While high-level system architecture and complex stakeholder communication provide some insulation, AI is drastically increasing individual productivity, which will likely lead to significant restructuring of entry-level roles and QA functions.

title: 太阳能光伏安装工
exposure_rationale: 太阳能安装是高度物理化的，涉及屋顶工作、电气接线和设备搬运。虽然AI可以优化系统设计和场地评估，但物理安装工作需要人类的灵巧性和现场适应能力。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, involving manual labor, climbing roofs, and using hand tools in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like system design optimization or site measurements via computer vision, the actual installation and maintenance require human dexterity and physical presence that current and near-future AI/robotics cannot replicate.

title: 特殊教育教师
exposure_rationale: 特殊教育的核心需要物理存在来为有特殊需求的学生提供个性化支持。虽然AI可以协助个性化教学计划制定和进度跟踪，但该角色的深度人际互动和物理辅助需求为全面自动化提供了强大的屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: AI will significantly streamline the digital and administrative aspects of the role, such as drafting Individualized Education Programs (IEPs), adapting lesson plans, and tracking student data. However, the core of the job requires intense physical presence, emotional intelligence, and real-time behavioral management for students with complex disabilities, which AI cannot replicate.

title: 特效艺术家和动画师
exposure_rationale: 该职业高度数字化，核心工作——3D建模、动画制作和特效合成——正被生成式AI快速转化。虽然高层创意指导和技术问题解决仍需人类，但大量的制作工作面临显著的AI自动化影响。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is almost entirely digital, with core tasks like 3D modeling, rendering, and animation being directly disrupted by generative AI and automated rigging tools. While high-level creative direction and complex team collaboration remain human-centric, AI is rapidly automating the 'routine' aspects of CGI and visual effects, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of workers needed for large-scale productions.

title: 言语语言病理学家
exposure_rationale: 言语治疗需要物理存在来评估患者、指导练习和提供治疗。虽然AI可以提供远程辅助工具和进展监测，但核心的临床互动和治疗关系需要人类的专业判断和共情。
exposure_rationale_en: Speech-language pathology involves a significant amount of digital-adjacent work, such as analyzing speech patterns, documenting progress, and developing treatment plans, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for swallowing therapy, real-time interpersonal coaching, and high-stakes clinical judgment that limits full automation.

title: 固定设备工程师和锅炉操作员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及在工业环境中操作和维护大型设备。虽然AI可以优化系统监控和预测维护需求，但物理设备操作和应急响应仍需人类存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical maintenance, manual repairs, and hands-on troubleshooting of heavy mechanical equipment in unpredictable physical environments. While AI and automated control systems can enhance monitoring and data logging, they cannot perform the physical tasks of overhauling valves, lubricating parts, or crawling inside boilers for inspections.

title: 心理健康和成瘾咨询师
exposure_rationale: 心理健康咨询的核心建立在治疗关系、同理心和对复杂人类行为的理解之上。虽然AI可以协助评估工具和治疗资源匹配，但面对面的咨询和危机干预是该职业不可替代的核心。
title_en: Substance abuse, behavioral disorder, and mental health counselors
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a mix of high-level knowledge work and intense interpersonal interaction. While AI can significantly assist with digital tasks like documentation, treatment planning, and monitoring progress, the core of the job requires human empathy, crisis intervention, and the navigation of complex emotional and physical environments that AI cannot yet replicate.

title: 手术助理和技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业需要在手术室中的物理存在来准备器械、协助手术和维护无菌环境。虽然AI可以增强术前规划，但手术过程中的物理协助工作仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, sterile technique, and real-time presence in an operating room. While AI and robotics can assist with surgical precision or inventory management, the role remains centered on hands-on patient care and physical equipment handling that cannot be digitized.

title: 调查研究员
exposure_rationale: 调查研究是高度数字化的，涉及问卷设计、数据收集和统计分析——AI擅长的领域。虽然需要人类判断来设计有效的调查和解读复杂结果，但大量的数据处理工作极易受到自动化影响。
exposure_rationale_en: Survey research is a fundamentally digital knowledge occupation involving background research, survey design, statistical analysis, and report generation—all areas where LLMs and specialized AI tools excel. The BLS already projects a decline in employment due to data mining and big data efficiencies, and the rapid advancement of AI in synthesizing qualitative data and automating complex statistical workflows makes this role highly susceptible to significant restructuring and labor reduction.

title: 测量和制图技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了物理化的实地测量和数字化的数据处理。虽然AI和无人机正在自动化部分数据收集，但在复杂地形中操作设备和验证数据的物理要求提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital data processing. While AI and automation (via drones and GIS software) significantly enhance data analysis, map creation, and calculation tasks, the role still requires a physical presence to navigate rugged terrain, set markers, and operate equipment in the real world.

title: 测量师
exposure_rationale: 测量工作结合了实地测量和数字数据处理。虽然AI和GPS技术正在提高效率，但在各种环境中进行精确物理测量和设立标记的需求仍需人类存在。
exposure_rationale_en: Surveying is a hybrid occupation that combines significant physical fieldwork with digital data processing. While AI and automation (via drones and GIS) are rapidly increasing productivity in the mapping and analysis phases, the core requirements of physical site visits, navigating rugged terrain, and providing legally certified human testimony in court create a substantial barrier to full automation.

title: 税务审查员和税收代理
exposure_rationale: 该职业大量涉及数字化的税务数据分析和法规合规检查，AI在这些领域非常精通。虽然实地审计和纳税人面谈的物理和人际方面提供了一些保护，但核心的数据分析工作面临显著的自动化压力。
title_en: Tax examiners and collectors, and revenue agents
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is highly exposed because its core tasks—reviewing financial documents, identifying discrepancies, and interpreting tax law—are digital information-processing tasks where AI excels. While revenue agents handling complex corporate audits and collectors performing field investigations require human judgment and interpersonal skills, a significant portion of the routine examination and data verification work is already being automated or enhanced by sophisticated algorithms.

title: 出租车司机和专车司机
exposure_rationale: 虽然自动驾驶技术是长期威胁，但目前该职业仍需要物理存在来导航复杂的城市环境、协助乘客和处理不可预测的交通状况。AI在导航和调度方面的辅助已经在提高效率。
title_en: Taxi drivers, shuttle drivers, and chauffeurs
exposure_rationale_en: While the core task of driving is highly susceptible to automation through autonomous vehicle technology (AI), the job currently requires significant physical presence for tasks like loading luggage, assisting passengers with disabilities, and performing vehicle maintenance. The transition to fully driverless fleets faces regulatory and technical hurdles in complex environments, but the long-term trajectory for this digital-adjacent physical task is one of high potential displacement.

title: 教师助理
exposure_rationale: 该角色主要需要物理存在来支持课堂教学和帮助个别学生。虽然AI可以自动化评分和材料准备等辅助任务，但直接的学生互动和行为管理的物理要求提供了保护。
exposure_rationale_en: Teacher assistants have moderate exposure because AI can significantly automate their administrative and instructional support tasks, such as grading, lesson preparation, and providing personalized tutoring through AI agents. However, a large portion of the role involves physical supervision, behavioral management, and assisting students with special needs or personal hygiene, which require a physical human presence that AI cannot replace.

title: 技术文档撰写人员
exposure_rationale: 技术写作是完全数字化的职业，核心任务——文档编写、信息组织和技术翻译——与大语言模型的能力高度一致。AI已经能够生成高质量的技术文档，显著提高生产力并可能减少所需的写作人员数量。
exposure_rationale_en: Technical writing is a fully digital occupation centered on synthesizing complex information into clear documentation, a core strength of Large Language Models. AI can already draft manuals, summarize technical specs, and generate code documentation, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of human writers needed for routine documentation tasks.

title: 电信技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量物理化的设备安装、维护和故障排除工作。虽然AI可以增强诊断和远程监控能力，但在电信塔和布线系统中的物理工作仍需人类技术员完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is physical labor, including climbing towers, installing hardware, and manual troubleshooting in unpredictable environments, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI can assist with remote diagnostics, network optimization, and predictive maintenance, the physical necessity of splicing cables and mounting equipment ensures the role remains primarily human-driven.

title: 银行柜员
exposure_rationale: 银行柜员的核心工作——处理交易、验证身份和客户服务——大量是数字化和常规的。ATM、网上银行和AI驱动的客户服务已经导致该职业的显著下降，且自动化趋势仍在加速。
exposure_rationale_en: Tellers face high exposure because their core tasks—processing routine financial transactions and verifying information—are digital in nature and highly susceptible to automation through AI and advanced self-service technology. While the physical handling of cash provides a slight buffer, the rapid shift toward mobile banking, AI-driven fraud detection, and interactive video kiosks is significantly reducing the need for human intervention in these roles.

title: 高级管理人员
exposure_rationale: 高级管理人员从事高层次的战略决策和领导工作。虽然AI可以显著增强数据分析和决策支持，但战略愿景、组织领导和高风险决策的人类判断方面使该角色对全面自动化有较强的抵抗力。
exposure_rationale_en: Top executives perform high-level knowledge work including financial analysis, strategic planning, and contract review, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core of the role involves human-centric responsibilities like leadership, high-stakes negotiation, and accountability to boards or the public, which provide a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 导游
exposure_rationale: 导游工作的核心需要物理存在来带领游客、讲解景点和处理实时情况。虽然AI驱动的音频导览和虚拟旅游正在发展，但人类导游提供的互动性和文化解读仍然有独特价值。
exposure_rationale_en: While AI can automate the digital aspects of the job—such as researching history, planning itineraries, and providing multilingual translations—the core of the role requires physical presence and real-time human interaction. Guides must physically escort groups through unpredictable environments, manage group dynamics, and provide a personal, empathetic experience that digital tools cannot fully replicate.

title: 培训和发展经理
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字化的项目设计和数据分析工作，AI可以显著增强。然而，领导培训团队和与高管合作的人际方面为全面自动化提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This role is predominantly digital and knowledge-based, involving the creation of instructional content, data-driven needs assessments, and budget management—all areas where AI is highly capable. While the role requires significant human-centric leadership and stakeholder collaboration, AI can automate the generation of training materials, personalize learning paths, and analyze program effectiveness, substantially increasing the productivity of each manager.

title: 培训和发展专员
exposure_rationale: 培训工作结合了数字化的课程设计和面对面的教学实施。虽然AI可以自动化内容创建和学习路径优化，但现场培训和员工辅导的人际方面仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: Much of the core work, such as designing training manuals, creating online learning modules, and assessing needs through data, is digital and highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires interpersonal skills for live delivery and collaboration, AI can now generate curriculum, simulate training scenarios, and personalize learning paths, significantly increasing individual productivity and potentially reducing the number of specialists needed for content creation.

title: 运输、仓储和配送经理
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字化的物流优化和数据分析，AI在这些领域非常精通。然而，仓库和运输设施的物理监督以及员工管理的人际方面提供了对全面自动化的缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as logistics planning, budgeting, and supply chain optimization, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains. However, the core job also requires physical presence for facility inspections, safety compliance monitoring, and high-stakes interpersonal leadership in unpredictable environments like warehouses and railyards, providing a buffer against full automation.

title: 旅行社代理人
exposure_rationale: 旅行代理的核心工作——研究目的地、比较价格和预订行程——几乎完全是数字化的，且已经面临在线预订平台和AI推荐系统的重大冲击。虽然复杂行程规划和客户关系的人际方面提供了一些保护，但该职业面临持续的自动化压力。
exposure_rationale_en: The core functions of a travel agent—researching destinations, comparing prices, building itineraries, and processing bookings—are entirely digital and involve information synthesis that AI can now perform instantly. While high-end human agents provide personalized judgment and crisis management, AI's ability to handle complex natural language queries and real-time logistics makes the vast majority of the occupation's routine tasks highly susceptible to automation.

title: 家教/辅导老师
exposure_rationale: 辅导工作结合了数字化的学习内容和面对面的教学。AI驱动的个性化学习平台正在提供越来越有效的辅导服务，但人际互动和对学生个性化需求的理解仍是人类辅导员的独特优势。
exposure_rationale_en: Tutors primarily engage in knowledge transfer, explanation, and feedback—tasks where generative AI and personalized learning algorithms excel. While the interpersonal and motivational aspects of tutoring provide some protection, the core work product is digital/informational, and AI's ability to provide 24/7, low-cost, personalized instruction for standardized tests and core subjects creates significant displacement risk.

title: 裁判
exposure_rationale: 体育裁判的核心需要物理存在来观察比赛和做出实时判罚。虽然AI辅助判罚技术（如VAR）正在一些运动中使用，但维护比赛秩序和做出最终裁决的人类存在仍不可替代。
title_en: Umpires, referees, and other sports officials
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of physical presence and objective data processing. While computer vision and AI can already automate 'calls' (like strike zones or out-of-bounds) with higher accuracy than humans, the role still requires physical presence to manage player conduct, ensure safety, and handle real-time interpersonal disputes on the field.

title: 城市和区域规划师
exposure_rationale: 城市规划涉及大量数字化的数据分析、GIS建模和政策研究，AI在这些领域能力很强。然而，社区参与、公众听证和实地调研的物理和人际方面为全面自动化提供了缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: Urban planners perform heavy knowledge work including data analysis, GIS mapping, and report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. However, the role requires significant physical site inspections and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation with government officials and the public, which provides a buffer against total automation.

title: 兽医
exposure_rationale: 兽医工作的核心涉及物理检查、手术和动物处理，需要手工灵巧性和直接的物理接触。虽然AI将增强诊断支持和治疗方案建议，但临床物理工作仍然需要人类兽医完成。
exposure_rationale_en: Veterinary work is a hybrid of physical procedures and complex diagnostic knowledge work. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through image analysis (X-rays/ultrasounds) and treatment planning, the core of the job requires physical surgery, manual examinations, and high-stakes interpersonal communication with pet owners that cannot be automated.

title: 兽医助理和实验动物护理员
exposure_rationale: 该角色主要涉及动物的物理照护和实验室维护工作。虽然AI可能协助记录保持和健康监测，但喂养、清洁和处理动物的核心职责需要物理存在。
title_en: Veterinary assistants and laboratory animal caretakers
exposure_rationale_en: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical and manual, involving the handling, feeding, and restraining of live animals in unpredictable environments. While AI might assist with peripheral administrative tasks or diagnostic data entry, it cannot replace the physical presence and manual dexterity required for animal care, sterilization, and surgical assistance.

title: 兽医技术员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量物理化的动物护理和实验室工作。虽然AI可以增强诊断能力和数据管理，但协助手术、采集样本和护理动物的物理任务仍需人类完成。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks that AI cannot perform, such as restraining animals, administering anesthesia, performing surgery prep, and providing emergency first aid. However, AI has significant exposure in the diagnostic and administrative aspects of the job, including analyzing lab results, interpreting X-rays, and managing patient records, which may increase individual productivity.

title: 服务员
exposure_rationale: 服务员的核心工作涉及物理化的送餐、清桌和客户互动。虽然自助点餐和送餐机器人正在一些场景中使用，但大多数餐厅仍需要人类服务员提供的物理服务和人际互动。
exposure_rationale_en: While AI and automation are increasingly handling digital tasks like order-taking and payments via kiosks or mobile apps, the core of the job remains physical and interpersonal. The physical requirements of carrying trays, clearing tables, and providing real-time human hospitality in a dynamic environment create a significant barrier to full AI replacement.

title: 水和污水处理厂操作员
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及在工业环境中操作复杂的处理设备和监控水质。虽然AI可以优化化学品投入和系统监控，但物理设备操作和应急响应仍需人类存在。
title_en: Water and wastewater treatment plant and system operators
exposure_rationale_en: The occupation is a hybrid of physical labor and digital monitoring, with AI and advanced automation already contributing to a projected 7% decline in employment. While AI can optimize chemical dosing, analyze sensor data, and manage complex system flows, the role still requires physical presence for equipment maintenance, manual sampling, and emergency response to mechanical failures.

title: 水运工人
exposure_rationale: 水运工作涉及大量物理劳动，如设备操作和货物处理。虽然自动化导航系统正在发展，但在水上环境中操作和维护船只的物理要求提供了对全面自动化的显著屏障。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the work is physical and requires real-time presence in unpredictable maritime environments, involving manual tasks like equipment maintenance, cargo handling, and emergency response. While AI can assist with navigation, fuel optimization, and predictive maintenance for engineers, the high-stakes physical safety requirements and the need for human intervention in complex docking or mechanical failures limit overall exposure.

title: 网页开发人员和数字设计师
exposure_rationale: 该职业完全数字化，核心任务——编写代码、设计界面和创建数字内容——与AI能力高度一致。虽然复杂的用户体验设计和客户协作需要人类判断，但AI可以自动化大量的编码和设计工作，显著提高生产力。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is entirely digital, with core tasks like writing code (HTML, JavaScript), designing layouts, and creating prototypes being areas where AI has demonstrated high proficiency. AI tools can now generate functional code from natural language and create sophisticated visual mockups, significantly increasing individual productivity and potentially reducing the number of developers needed for standard projects.

title: 焊工
exposure_rationale: 焊接工作是高度物理化的，需要手工灵巧性和在多种环境中的精确操作。虽然自动化焊接机器人在工厂环境中越来越普遍，但现场维修和定制工作仍需人类焊工的技能和物理存在。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, physical stamina, and real-time adaptation to unpredictable environments like construction sites or repair shops. While AI and robotics can automate routine assembly-line welding, the specialized, non-routine tasks and the need for physical presence in varied locations provide a strong barrier against AI displacement.

title: 批发和制造业销售代表
exposure_rationale: 该职业涉及大量数字化的产品知识管理和客户数据分析，AI在这些领域很有能力。然而，建立客户关系和进行复杂的B2B谈判的人际方面提供了对全面自动化的保护。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is heavily focused on information processing, communication, and data analysis, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. While high-stakes B2B negotiations and physical trade shows provide a buffer, AI can now handle lead generation, personalized outreach, price optimization, and technical product explanations, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of representatives needed.

title: 风力涡轮机技术员
exposure_rationale: 风力涡轮机维护是高度物理化的，涉及在高空和偏远地点的设备检修。虽然AI可以增强预测性维护和故障诊断，但物理维修工作需要人类技术员的存在和灵巧性。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of this occupation involves high-stakes physical labor, including climbing 200-foot towers, rappelling, and performing manual repairs in confined spaces. While AI can assist with remote monitoring and predictive maintenance diagnostics, the physical requirement to replace components and perform manual inspections in unpredictable outdoor environments provides a strong barrier to automation.

title: 木工
exposure_rationale: 木工工作涉及大量手工操作和物理工具使用。虽然CNC机器和AI设计工具正在一些领域提高效率，但定制家具和精细木工的手工艺方面仍然高度依赖人类技能。
exposure_rationale_en: The core of the job involves physical manipulation of materials, manual dexterity, and real-time sensory monitoring in a workshop environment, which are resistant to AI. While AI can optimize digital design (CAD) and CNC programming, the physical assembly, finishing, and machine maintenance require a human presence that limits overall exposure.

title: 作家
exposure_rationale: 写作是完全数字化的职业，与大语言模型的核心能力完美一致。AI已经能够生成高质量的文章、故事和商业文案，显著提高个人生产力。虽然独特的人类声音和深度创意仍有价值，但大量常规写作工作面临极高的自动化压力。
exposure_rationale_en: The core work product of writers and authors is entirely digital and text-based, which aligns perfectly with the primary capabilities of Large Language Models. AI can now generate drafts, conduct research, and perform editing tasks across various formats like blogs, copy, and scripts, significantly increasing productivity while simultaneously threatening to automate many entry-level and routine writing roles.

title: 动物学家和野生动物生物学家
exposure_rationale: 该职业结合了物理化的实地研究和数字化的数据分析。虽然AI在图像识别和生态建模方面能力很强，但在野外环境中收集数据、观察动物行为和进行保护工作的物理要求提供了对全面自动化的显著缓冲。
exposure_rationale_en: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. AI significantly impacts the data-heavy aspects of the job, such as analyzing GIS data, processing camera trap imagery, and modeling population dynamics, but it cannot replace the physical requirements of collecting biological specimens, handling wild animals, or navigating remote outdoor environments.
